33905.title: Racial Disparities in Mortality by Sex, Age, and Cause of Death
33905.zh_title: 按性别、年龄和死因划分的死亡率种族差异
33905.authors: Robert Kaestner, Anuj Gangopadhyaya, Cuiping Schiman
33905.abstract: Racial differences in mortality are large, persistent and likely caused, at least in part, by racism. While the causal pathways linking racism to mortality are conceptually well defined, empirical evidence to support causal claims related to its effect on health is incomplete. In this study, we provide a unique set of facts about racial disparities in mortality that all theories of racism and health need to confront to be convincing. We measure racial disparities in mortality between ages 40 and 80 for both males and females and for several causes of death and, measure how those disparities change with age. Estimates indicate that racial disparities in mortality grow with age but at a decreasing rate. Estimates also indicate that the source of racial disparities in mortality changes with age, sex and cause of death. For men in their fifties, racial disparities in mortality are primarily caused by disparities in deaths due to external causes. For both sexes, it is racial disparities in death from healthcare amenable causes that are the main cause of racial disparities in mortality between ages 55 and 75. Notably, racial disparities in cancer and other causes of death are relatively small even though these causes of death account for over half of all deaths. Adjusting for economic resources and health largely eliminate racial disparities in mortality at all ages and the mediating effect of these factors grows with age. The pattern of results suggests that, to the extent that racism influences health, it is primarily through racism’s effect on investments to treat healthcare amenable diseases that cause racial disparities in mortality.
33905.zh_abstract: 死亡率方面的种族差异巨大且持续存在，并且至少部分是由种族主义造成的。尽管将种族主义与死亡率联系起来的因果路径在概念上定义明确，但支持其影响健康这一因果主张的经验证据尚不完整。在本研究中，我们提供了一组关于死亡率种族差异的独特事实，所有关于种族主义和健康的理论都需要面对这些事实才能令人信服。我们测量了40至80岁之间男性和女性以及多种死因的死亡率种族差异，并测量了这些差异如何随年龄变化。估计表明，死亡率种族差异随年龄增长而扩大，但增速递减。估计还表明，死亡率种族差异的来源随年龄、性别和死因而变化。对于五十多岁的男性，死亡率种族差异主要由外部原因导致的死亡差异引起。对于两性而言，在55至75岁之间，可医疗干预原因导致的死亡种族差异是死亡率种族差异的主要原因。值得注意的是，癌症和其他死因的种族差异相对较小，尽管这些死因占所有死亡的一半以上。调整经济资源和健康状况后，几乎消除了所有年龄段的死亡率种族差异，并且这些因素的中介效应随年龄增长而增强。结果模式表明，就种族主义影响健康而言，它主要是通过种族主义对治疗可医疗干预疾病的投资产生影响，从而导致了死亡率种族差异。

33904.title: Republican Support and Economic Hardship: The Enduring Effects of the Opioid Epidemic
33904.zh_title: 共和党支持与经济困境：阿片类药物流行的持久影响
33904.abstract: In this paper, we establish a causal connection between two of the most salient social developments in the United States over the past decades: the opioid epidemic and the political realignment between the Republican and Democratic parties. Drawing on unsealed records from litigation against Purdue Pharma, we uncover rich geographic variation in the marketing of prescription opioids that serves as a quasi-exogenous source of exposure to the epidemic. We use this variation to document significant increases in drug-related mortality and greater reliance on public transfer programs. This induced economic hardship led to substantial changes in the political landscape of the communities most affected by the opioid epidemic. We estimate that from the mid-2000s to 2022, exposure to the opioid epidemic continuously increased the Republican vote share in House, presidential, and gubernatorial elections. By the 2022 House elections, a one-standard-deviation increase in our measure of exposure led to a 4.5 percentage point increase in the Republican vote share. From 2012 until 2022, this increase in the House vote share translated into Republicans winning additional seats.
33904.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们建立了美国过去几十年中两个最显著的社会发展之间的因果关系：阿片类药物流行以及共和党与民主党之间的政治重组。利用针对普渡制药诉讼中解封的记录，我们发现了处方阿片类药物营销中丰富的地区差异，这构成了接触该流行病的准外生来源。我们利用这种差异记录了药物相关死亡率的显著增加以及对公共转移支付项目更大的依赖。这种诱发的经济困境导致了受阿片类药物流行影响最严重的社区政治格局的重大变化。我们估计，从2000年代中期到2022年，接触阿片类药物流行持续增加了共和党在众议院、总统和州长选举中的得票率。到2022年众议院选举时，我们的接触度衡量指标每增加一个标准差，共和党得票率就会增加4.5个百分点。从2012年到2022年，众议院得票率的这种增加转化为共和党赢得了额外的席位。

33903.title: Pushing the Envelope: The Effects of Salary Negotiations
33903.zh_title: 挑战极限：薪资谈判的影响
33903.authors: Zoë B. Cullen, Bobak Pakzad-Hurson, Ricardo Perez-Truglia
33903.abstract: Salary negotiations are a widespread phenomenon that can shape key labor market outcomes, including welfare and inequality. We provide novel empirical and theoretical insights into the causes and consequences of salary negotiations. We conducted two field experiments involving over 3,100 job seekers in the U.S. tech sector, designed to examine two types of information frictions. We find that a light-touch encouragement intervention significantly increased both negotiation attempts and compensation gains. In contrast, providing a substantial discount on negotiation coaching did not significantly affect negotiation attempts. We develop a new model of salary negotiations, incorporating risk and information frictions, that can better explain our experimental and non-experimental findings. The model’s equilibrium analysis indicates that policies encouraging negotiation can enhance both welfare and equity.
33903.zh_abstract: 薪资谈判是一种普遍现象，可以塑造关键的劳动力市场结果，包括福利和不平等。我们对薪资谈判的原因和后果提供了新颖的经验和理论见解。我们进行了两项涉及美国科技行业超过3100名求职者的实地实验，旨在考察两种类型的信息摩擦。我们发现，一种轻触式的鼓励干预显著增加了谈判尝试和薪酬收益。相比之下，为谈判辅导提供大幅折扣并未显著影响谈判尝试。我们开发了一个新的薪资谈判模型，纳入了风险和摩擦因素，可以更好地解释我们的实验和非实验发现。该模型的均衡分析表明，鼓励谈判的政策可以增强福利和公平性。
33903.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：C9, D80, J30, J38, J7

33902.title: The French Touch: Product Quality and France’s Great Trade Liberalization, 1850-1874
33902.zh_title: 法式风情：产品质量与法国的大贸易自由化（1850-1874）
33902.authors: Stéphane Becuwe, Bertrand Blancheton, Christopher M. Meissner
33902.abstract: We explore changes in product quality during France’s major liberalization episode of the mid-nineteenth century. Using new data and existing techniques from the international trade literature, we investigate the relative quality of French products versus those of international competitors, within industry changes in quality, and within product quality changes. France produced relatively high quality/high unit value products in the traded sector throughout the period. Liberalization was associated with an overall decline in the quality of French exports. However, some of the best-selling exports experienced an apparent rise in quality around the time of liberalization. As for imports, while French spending may have switched to lower quality products due to liberalization, lower tariffs were associated with rising within product quality.
33902.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了19世纪中叶法国重大自由化时期产品质量的变化。利用国际贸易文献中的新数据和现有技术，我们研究了法国产品相对于国际竞争对手的相对质量、行业内的质量变化以及产品内的质量变化。在整个时期内，法国在贸易部门生产了相对高质量/高单位价值的产品。自由化与法国出口质量的整体下降相关。然而，一些最畅销的出口产品在自由化前后质量出现了明显上升。至于进口，虽然由于自由化，法国的支出可能转向了较低质量的产品，但较低的关税与产品内质量的上升相关。

33901.title: Measuring Markets for Network Goods
33901.authors: Leonardo Bursztyn, Matthew Gentzkow, Rafael Jiménez-Durán, Aaron Leonard, Filip Milojević, Christopher Roth
33901.abstract: Market definition is challenging in settings with network effects, where substitution patterns depend on changes in network size. We study these effects in the context of social media. We conduct an incentivized experiment comparing substitution in response to a proposed U.S. TikTok ban, in which all users simultaneously leave the app, with substitution when only a single user deactivates. We find substantially higher valuations of alternative social apps under a collective TikTok ban than under an individual TikTok deactivation. Mechanism evidence shows that both anticipated content-supply shifts and social coordination partly explain the wedge, with the relative importance of each channel varying across platforms. We then show that a collective time limit challenge, where peers jointly reduce TikTok and Instagram use, leads to more time spent on alternative social apps than has been observed in prior individual deactivation experiments. Together, our results suggest that individual-level substitution estimates can be an unreliable guide to market definition for network goods.
33901.zh_abstract: 在存在网络效应的环境中，市场界定具有挑战性，因为替代模式取决于网络规模的变化。我们在社交媒体的背景下研究了这些效应。我们进行了一项激励实验，比较了在拟议的美国TikTok禁令（所有用户同时离开该应用）下的替代行为，与仅单个用户停用时的替代行为。我们发现，在集体TikTok禁令下，对替代社交应用的估值远高于个人TikTok停用下的估值。机制证据表明，预期的内容供给变化和社会协调部分解释了这种差异，且每个渠道的相对重要性因平台而异。然后我们表明，一项集体时间限制挑战（同伴共同减少TikTok和Instagram的使用）导致在替代社交应用上花费的时间多于先前个人停用实验中所观察到的。总之，我们的结果表明，个体层面的替代估计可能不是网络商品市场界定的可靠指南。

33900.title: Financial Firepower: School Shootings and the Strategic Contributions of Pro-Gun PACs
33900.zh_title: 金融火力：校园枪击案与支持持枪政治行动委员会的战略性捐款
33900.authors: Eric A. Baldwin, Takuma Iwasaki, John J. Donohue
33900.abstract: Fatal school shootings often spark support for stricter gun laws, threatening the gun lobby’s influence and agenda. To prevent political fallout, do pro-gun Political Action Committees increase contributions after fatal school shootings? Leveraging a novel dataset of pro-gun PAC contributions and school shooting incidents, we implement a difference-in-differences design with staggered treatment adoption to estimate the causal effect of school shootings on contributions to House candidates. We find that pro-gun PACs increase contributions by 30.2% to candidates in districts with fatal school shootings, but show no significant response to non-fatal school shootings or other mass shootings. The temporal pattern reveals strategic behavior: contribution spikes emerge in the wake of fatal school shootings and in proximity to elections, with effects dramatically amplified as Election Day approaches; within two months of Election Day, contributions increase by 1,730%. These effects are concentrated in competitive districts (margins of 5%). Our findings provide robust evidence that pro-gun PACs deploy targeted financial contributions in response to school shootings, with the magnitude and timing suggesting a strategic counter-mobilization effort to maintain influence in affected districts when gun policy becomes locally salient and elections are near. Our findings underscore a gap in democratic accountability: while public opinion should drive policy change, organized interests with financial power can insulate political candidates from public pressure and obstruct its translation into legislative reform.
33900.zh_abstract: 致命的校园枪击事件常常引发对更严格枪支法律的支持，威胁到枪支游说团体的影响力和议程。为了防止政治后果，支持持枪的政治行动委员会（PAC）是否会在致命校园枪击事件后增加捐款？利用一个包含支持持枪PAC捐款和校园枪击事件的新数据集，我们采用交错处理采纳的双重差分设计来估计校园枪击事件对众议院候选人捐款的因果效应。我们发现，在发生致命校园枪击事件的选区，支持持枪的PAC对候选人的捐款增加了30.2%，但对非致命校园枪击事件或其他大规模枪击事件没有显著反应。时间模式揭示了战略性行为：捐款激增出现在致命校园枪击事件发生后以及临近选举时，随着选举日的临近，效应急剧放大；在选举日前两个月内，捐款增加了1730%。这些效应集中在竞争激烈的选区（胜负差距为5%）。我们的研究结果提供了强有力的证据，表明支持持枪的PAC针对校园枪击事件部署了有针对性的金融捐款，其规模和时机表明这是一种战略性的反动员努力，旨在当枪支政策在当地变得突出且选举临近时，在受影响的选区维持影响力。我们的发现强调了民主问责制中的一个缺口：虽然公众舆论应推动政策变革，但拥有金融力量的有组织利益集团可以使政治候选人免受公众压力，并阻碍其转化为立法改革。
33900.meta: Programs：LE, PE, POL；JEL：C21, C22, C23, D72, D78, K00

33927.title: Bequests
33927.abstract: In this paper, we discuss bequests and other intergenerational transfers and what impact they have on the consumption, saving, and labor supply behavior of households. We show that bequests and other intergenerational transfers are prevalent in most countries, that they are sometimes motivated by altruism and sometimes by selfishness, that they affect the consumption and saving behavior of households to some extent, especially that of elderly households, that they affect the labor supply behavior of households, especially that of bequest recipients, and that they have important policy implications.
33927.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们讨论遗产和其他代际转移，以及它们对家庭消费、储蓄和劳动力供给行为的影响。我们表明，遗产和其他代际转移在大多数国家普遍存在，它们有时出于利他动机，有时出于自私动机，它们在一定程度上影响家庭的消费和储蓄行为，尤其是老年家庭，它们影响家庭的劳动力供给行为，尤其是遗产接受者，并且它们具有重要的政策含义。
33927.meta: Programs：AG, CH, EFG, LS, PE；JEL：D11, D12, D14, D15, D31, D64, E21, H31, J22

33926.title: Welfare Programs and Crime Spillovers
33926.zh_title: 福利计划与犯罪溢出效应
33926.authors: David Jinkins, Elira Kuka, Claudio Labanca
33926.abstract: Research on the social safety net examines its effects on recipients and their families. We show that these effects extend beyond recipients’ families. Using a regression discontinuity design and administrative data, we study a Danish policy that cut welfare benefits for refugees, increasing crime among affected individuals. Linking refugees to neighbors, we find increased crime among non-Danish neighbors, with spillovers persisting even after direct effects stabilize. Accounting for these spillovers raises the marginal value of public funds by 20%. We explore several mechanisms and find evidence consistent with peer effects among young individuals from the same country of origin.
33926.zh_abstract: 关于社会安全网的研究考察了其对受益者及其家庭的影响。我们表明，这些影响超出了受益者家庭的范围。利用断点回归设计和行政数据，我们研究了一项丹麦政策，该政策削减了难民的福利金，增加了受影响个体的犯罪。将难民与其邻居联系起来，我们发现非丹麦裔邻居的犯罪增加，即使在直接影响稳定后，溢出效应仍然持续。考虑这些溢出效应使公共资金的边际价值提高了20%。我们探讨了几种机制，并发现了与来自同一原籍国的年轻人之间的同伴效应相一致的证据。

33925.title: Does Matching Contribution Incentivize Informal Workers to Participate in Retirement Saving Plans? A Randomized Evaluation Interacted with a Natural Experiment
33925.zh_title: 匹配缴款能否激励非正规工人参与退休储蓄计划？一项与自然实验交互的随机评估
33925.authors: Noelia Bernal, Sebastian Galiani, Oswaldo Molina
33925.abstract: We conducted a large field experiment in Peru on informal workers and studied whether offering them a matching contribution raise participation and contributions in their Individual Retirement Accounts. We had three groups: a control group receiving no match, and two treatments groups receiving 50 and 100 percent match, respectively. Additionally, due to the time span, we can also analyze the difference responses between pre and during Covid-19. The results were as follows. First, the match incentive increases participation. Workers in the 50 and 100 percent match groups show participation rates of 5.2 and 6.5 p.p. higher than workers in the control group, respectively. The participation effect is also present pre Covid-19 and disappears during it. Second, the 100 percent match incentive was the only effective in increasing savings among all individuals (1.4 p.p.), pre (2.3 p.p.) and during Covid-19 (0.97 p.p.). This effect still presents in LATE specification with higher p.p. Third, 100% match was again the only effective to make contribute more than once, in the full sample (1.2 p.p.), and pre Covid-19 (2.7 p.p.), including LATE specification (full sample – 5.6 p.p.; pre Covid-19 – 8.2p.p.). Fourth the 50 percent match is not effective in raising contribution in any specification.
33925.zh_abstract: 我们在秘鲁对非正规工人进行了一项大型实地实验，研究向他们提供匹配缴款是否会提高其个人退休账户的参与率和缴款额。我们设置了三个组：一个不接受匹配的对照组，以及分别接受50%和100%匹配的两个处理组。此外，由于时间跨度，我们还可以分析新冠疫情前和期间的不同反应。结果如下。首先，匹配激励提高了参与率。50%和100%匹配组的工人参与率分别比对照组高5.2和6.5个百分点。参与效应在新冠疫情前也存在，但在疫情期间消失。其次，100%匹配激励是唯一有效提高所有个体储蓄的激励（1.4个百分点），在新冠疫情前（2.3个百分点）和期间（0.97个百分点）均有效。这一效应在LATE设定中仍然存在，且百分点更高。第三，100%匹配再次是唯一有效促使多次缴款的激励，在全样本（1.2个百分点）和新冠疫情前（2.7个百分点）均有效，包括LATE设定（全样本 – 5.6个百分点；新冠疫情前 – 8.2个百分点）。第四，50%匹配在任何设定下均未能有效提高缴款额。

33924.title: Using AI to Generate Option C Scaling Ideas: A Case Study in Early Education
33924.zh_title: 利用人工智能生成选项C扩展思路：以早期教育为例
33924.authors: Faith Fatchen, John A. List, Francesca Pagnotta
33924.abstract: In recent years, field experiments have reshaped policy worldwide, but scaling ideas remains a thorny challenge. Perhaps the most important issue facing policymakers today is deciding which ideas to scale. One approach to attenuate this information problem is to augment traditional A/B experimental designs to address questions of scalability from the beginning. List 2024 denotes this approach as “Option C” thinking. Using early education as a case study, we show how AI can overcome a critical barrier in Option C thinking – generating viable options for scaling experimentation. By integrating AI-driven insights, this approach strengthens the link between controlled trials and large-scale implementation, ensuring the production of policy-based evidence for effective decision-making.
33924.zh_abstract: 近年来，实地实验重塑了全球政策，但如何扩展思路仍是一个棘手挑战。当今政策制定者面临的最重要问题或许是决定哪些思路值得扩展。缓解这一信息问题的一种方法是从一开始就增强传统的A/B实验设计，以解决可扩展性问题。List（2024）将这种方法称为“选项C”思维。以早期教育为案例，我们展示了人工智能如何克服选项C思维中的一个关键障碍——为扩展实验生成可行的选项。通过整合人工智能驱动的洞察，这种方法加强了受控试验与大规模实施之间的联系，确保为有效决策提供基于政策的证据。
33924.meta: Programs：EEE, PE；JEL：C9, C90, C91, C92, C93, C99

33923.title: Like Great-Grandparent, Like Great-Grandchild? Multigenerational Mobility in American History
33923.zh_title: 曾祖辈如何，曾孙辈亦如何？美国历史上的多代际流动性
33923.authors: Zachary Ward, Kasey Buckles, Joseph Price
33923.abstract: Using data on 2.5 million great-grandchildren linked to their great-grandfathers in the US (1850–1940), we show that economic gaps persisted strongly across four generations despite major structural change. We find that one-third of the initial differences in economic status across white great-grandfathers remained in their great-grandchildren. When including both Black and white families, this persistence rises to about 50 percent, largely because the gap between Black and white families closed slowly over time. Grandparent and great-grandparent status matter beyond the father's status, indicating slower convergence to the mean than predicted by two-generational estimates. However, this excess persistence is largely driven by enduring racial inequality as grandparent effects are small within the white population.
33923.zh_abstract: 利用美国（1850-1940年）250万曾孙辈与其曾祖父相关联的数据，我们表明，尽管经历了重大结构性变革，经济差距在四代人之间依然持续存在。我们发现，白人曾祖父之间经济地位的初始差异中，有三分之一仍保留在其曾孙辈中。当同时纳入黑人和白人家庭时，这种持续性上升至约50%，这主要是因为黑人与白人家庭之间的差距随时间推移缓慢缩小。祖父母和曾祖父母的地位超越了父亲地位的影响，表明向均值的收敛速度慢于两代际估计所预测的速度。然而，这种额外的持续性在很大程度上是由持久的种族不平等驱动的，因为在白人群体内部，祖父母效应很小。

33922.title: The Neoclassical Theory of Firm Investment and Taxes: A Reassessment
33922.zh_title: 新古典企业投资与税收理论：重新评估
33922.abstract: This article corrects a 60-year history of mis-application of the neoclassical theory of investment to interpret empirical work and guide policy analysis. Empirical estimates of firm-level user cost elasticities of investment or capital have in fact studied two distinct objects, an elasticity holding output fixed that identifies the elasticity of substitution between capital and labor (Eisner and Nadiri, 1968) and an elasticity holding the wage fixed that sheds light on the revenue elasticity of capital (Coen, 1969). A review finds a consensus range for the Coen short-run user cost elasticity that translates into a priori plausible values for the revenue elasticity of capital, offering validation to the neoclassical theory. The long-run general equilibrium capital elasticity to the user cost instead holds labor fixed and depends on both firm-level parameters. This synthesis offers a framework for future work and helps to explain why policy institutions have differing views on the effects of corporate taxes.
33922.zh_abstract: 本文纠正了60年来对新古典投资理论的误用历史，这些误用体现在解释实证工作和指导政策分析中。对企业层面投资或资本的用户成本弹性的实证估计实际上研究了两个不同的对象：一个是在产出固定时估计的弹性，它识别了资本与劳动之间的替代弹性（Eisner和Nadiri, 1968）；另一个是在工资固定时估计的弹性，它揭示了资本的收入弹性（Coen, 1969）。综述发现，Coen短期用户成本弹性的共识范围转化为先验合理的资本收入弹性值，从而验证了新古典理论。长期一般均衡中资本对用户成本的弹性则保持劳动固定，并取决于这两个企业层面参数。这一综合为未来工作提供了一个框架，并有助于解释为何政策机构对企业税的影响持有不同观点。
33922.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, ME, PE；JEL：E23, G31, H25

33921.title: Increasing Degree Attainment Among Low-Income Students: The Role of Intensive Advising and College Quality
33921.zh_title: 提高低收入学生的学位获得率：强化咨询与大学质量的作用
33921.authors: Andrew C. Barr, Benjamin L. Castleman
33921.abstract: A college degree offers a pathway to economic mobility for low-income students. Using a multi-site randomized controlled trial combined with administrative and survey data, we demonstrate that intensive advising during high school and college significantly increases bachelor’s degree attainment among lower-income students. We leverage unique data on pre-advising college preferences and causal forest methods to show that these gains are primarily driven by improvements in initial enrollment quality. Our results suggest that strategies targeting college choice may be a more effective and efficient means of increasing degree attainment than those focused solely on affordability.
33921.zh_abstract: 大学学位为低收入学生提供了经济流动的途径。通过一项结合行政数据和调查数据的多地点随机对照试验，我们证明，在高中和大学期间提供强化咨询能显著提高低收入学生的学士学位获得率。我们利用咨询前大学偏好的独特数据和因果森林方法表明，这些收益主要源于初始入学质量的改善。我们的结果表明，与仅关注可负担性的策略相比，针对大学选择的策略可能是提高学位获得率更有效且更高效的手段。
33921.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：H52, I24, J24

33920.title: The Social Desirability Atlas
33920.authors: Leonardo Bursztyn, Ingar K. Haaland, Nicolas Röver, Christopher Roth
33920.abstract: Social desirability bias (SDB) is a pervasive threat to the validity of survey and experimental data. Respondents might often misreport sensitive attitudes and behaviors to appear more socially acceptable. We begin by synthesizing empirical evidence on the prevalence and magnitude of SDB across various domains, focusing on studies with individual-level benchmarks. We then critically assess commonly used strategies to mitigate SDB, highlighting how they can sometimes fail by creating confusion or inadvertently increasing perceived sensitivity. To help researchers navigate these challenges, we offer practical guidance on selecting the most suitable tools for different research contexts. Finally, we examine how SDB can distort treatment effects in experiments and discuss mitigation strategies.
33920.zh_abstract: 社会期望偏差（SDB）是对调查和实验数据有效性的普遍威胁。受访者可能经常误报敏感态度和行为，以显得更符合社会期望。我们首先综合了关于SDB在各个领域普遍性和程度的实证证据，重点关注具有个体层面基准的研究。然后，我们批判性地评估了常用的缓解SDB的策略，强调它们有时可能因造成混淆或无意中增加感知敏感性而失败。为了帮助研究人员应对这些挑战，我们提供了针对不同研究背景选择最合适工具的实用指南。最后，我们考察了SDB如何扭曲实验中的处理效应，并讨论了缓解策略。

33919.title: Scalable Targeting of Social Protection: When Do Algorithms Out-Perform Surveys and Community Knowledge?
33919.zh_title: 社会保障的可扩展精准瞄准：算法何时优于调查和社区知识？
33919.authors: Emily Aiken, Anik Ashraf, Joshua Blumenstock, Raymond Guiteras, Ahmed Mushfiq Mobarak
33919.abstract: Innovations in big data and algorithms are enabling new approaches to target interventions at scale. We compare the accuracy of three different systems for identifying the poor to receive benefit transfers — proxy means-testing, nominations from community members, and an algorithmic approach using machine learning to predict poverty using mobile phone usage behavior — and study how their cost-effectiveness varies with the scale and scope of the program. We collect mobile phone records from all major telecom operators in Bangladesh and conduct community-based wealth rankings and detailed consumption surveys of 5,000 households, to select the 22,000 poorest households for $\$300$ transfers from 106,000 listed households. While proxy-means testing is most accurate, algorithmic targeting becomes more cost-effective for national-scale programs where large numbers of households have to be screened. We explore the external validity of these insights using survey data and mobile phone records data from Togo, and cross-country information on benefit transfer programs from the World Bank.
33919.zh_abstract: 大数据和算法的创新正在为大规模干预措施的精准瞄准提供新方法。我们比较了三种识别贫困人口以发放福利转移支付系统的准确性——代理家计调查、社区成员提名以及利用机器学习通过手机使用行为预测贫困的算法方法——并研究了它们的成本效益如何随项目的规模和范围而变化。我们收集了孟加拉国所有主要电信运营商的手机记录，并对5000户家庭进行了社区财富排名和详细消费调查，从106000户登记家庭中选出22000户最贫困家庭，每户发放300美元转移支付。虽然代理家计调查最准确，但对于需要筛选大量家庭的国家级项目，算法瞄准变得更具成本效益。我们利用多哥的调查数据和手机记录数据，以及世界银行的跨国福利转移项目信息，探讨了这些洞察的外部有效性。

33918.title: Who Benefits from Paid Family Leave? The Impact on Informal and Formal Care for Middle-Aged and Older Adults with Disabilities
33918.zh_title: 谁从带薪家事假中受益？对中老年残疾人士非正式和正式照护的影响
33918.abstract: This paper analyzes the impact of paid family leave (PFL) policies on informal and formal care for middle-aged and older adults with disabilities in the U.S., and how the heterogeneous benefits accrue to different families. We use data from the 1998-2018 Health and Retirement Study (HRS) and leverage the PFL programs implemented in California (2004), New Jersey (2009), and New York (2018) in a difference-in-differences (DiD) design. We deploy both the conventional two-way fixed effects (TWFE) model and an adapted DiD estimator developed by Sun and Abraham for staggered rollout designs. We find that PFL access is associated with a 5.7 percentage point increase in the likelihood that individuals with disabilities receive informal care from their children. We also show that PFL access significantly increases the use of home care services and nursing home care. These effects are primarily concentrated among individuals with disabilities who have both a spouse and children, and are almost non-existent among those who have only children and no spouse. Our findings demonstrate that PFL policies improve care access and help address unmet care needs for middle-aged and older adults with disabilities, but their impact remains limited for certain vulnerable subgroups, particularly those with only children.
33918.zh_abstract: 本文分析了美国带薪家事假（PFL）政策对中老年残疾人士非正式和正式照护的影响，以及异质性收益如何在不同家庭中分配。我们使用1998-2018年健康与退休研究（HRS）的数据，并利用加利福尼亚州（2004年）、新泽西州（2009年）和纽约州（2018年）实施的PFL项目，采用双重差分（DiD）设计。我们同时部署了传统的双向固定效应（TWFE）模型和Sun与Abraham为交错推出设计改编的DiD估计量。我们发现，获得PFL与残疾人士从子女处获得非正式照护的可能性增加5.7个百分点相关。我们还表明，获得PFL显著增加了家庭护理服务和养老院护理的使用。这些效应主要集中在既有配偶又有子女的残疾人士中，而在仅有子女而无配偶的群体中几乎不存在。我们的发现表明，PFL政策改善了照护可及性，有助于满足中老年残疾人士未满足的照护需求，但其对某些脆弱亚群（特别是仅有子女的群体）的影响仍然有限。
33918.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I10, I38, J14, J18

33917.title: Nicotine Vaping and Youth Mental Health: New Evidence from E-Cigarette Regulations
33917.zh_title: 尼古丁电子烟与青少年心理健康：来自电子烟监管的新证据
33917.authors: Chad D. Cotti, Tessie Krishna, Johanna Catherine Maclean, Erik T. Nesson, Joseph J. Sabia
33917.abstract: The confluence of a youth mental health crisis and high rates of teenage nicotine vaping has led some U.S. tobacco control advocates to argue that reducing access to electronic nicotine delivery systems (ENDS) — through policies such as ENDS taxation — may improve youth and young adult mental health. Using data from several nationally representative surveys (Youth Risk Behavior Survey, Behavioral Risk Factor Surveillance System, and Population Assessment of Tobacco and Health) and a generalized difference-in-differences approach, we find no evidence that ENDS taxation improves youth and young adult mental health. With 95 percent confidence, we can rule out that the mean state ENDS tax increase adopted during our analysis sample ($\$0.34$ per mL of e-liquid in 2023$) reduces persistent depressive symptoms among youths by more than 0.3 percent and suicide ideation by more than 1.0 percent. Moreover, discrete-time hazard models provide little evidence that ENDS taxes affect dynamics in youth mental health. A similar pattern of results emerges when we examine a wider set of ENDS regulations, including minimum legal purchasing ages, e-cigarette licensure laws, online sales restrictions, and restrictions on indoor nicotine vaping.
33917.zh_abstract: 青少年心理健康危机与青少年尼古丁电子烟高使用率的交汇，导致一些美国烟草控制倡导者认为，减少电子尼古丁传送系统（ENDS）的可及性——例如通过ENDS税收等政策——可能改善青少年和年轻人的心理健康。利用来自多个全国代表性调查（青少年风险行为调查、行为风险因素监测系统和烟草与健康人口评估）的数据以及广义双重差分方法，我们没有发现ENDS税收能改善青少年和年轻人心理健康的证据。在95%的置信水平下，我们可以排除我们分析样本期间各州平均ENDS税收增加（2023年每毫升电子液体0.34美元）会使青少年持续性抑郁症状减少超过0.3%、自杀意念减少超过1.0%的可能性。此外，离散时间风险模型几乎没有提供ENDS税收影响青少年心理健康动态的证据。当我们考察更广泛的ENDS监管措施（包括最低法定购买年龄、电子烟许可法、在线销售限制和室内尼古丁电子烟限制）时，出现了类似的结果模式。
33917.meta: Programs：AG, CH, EH, LE, PE；JEL：I10, I18

33916.title: Abortion Restrictions and Intimate Partner Violence in the Dobbs Era
33916.zh_title: 多布斯时代堕胎限制与亲密伴侣暴力
33916.authors: Dhaval M. Dave, Christine Durrance, Bilge Erten, Yang Wang, Barbara L. Wolfe
33916.abstract: In overturning Roe v. Wade and triggering laws in many states that ban or severely restrict abortion, the Supreme Court’s landmark 2022 Dobbs decision dramatically altered the landscape of reproductive health in the U.S. Prior research has highlighted the far-reaching impact of abortion restrictions for women and families, which extend beyond their proximate effects on abortions, births, and fertility. We provide some of the first causal evidence on how abortion restrictions in the post-Dobbs era have impacted women’s risk of exposure to intimate partner violence (IPV). IPV is the most common form of violence experienced by women, and changes in access to abortion may generate unintended effects on various inputs (economic resources, stress, intrahousehold bargaining) that could affect relationship dynamics and raise the risk of IPV. Leveraging information on IPV incidents reported to law enforcement from 2017- 2023 combined with post-Dobbs changes in county-level travel distance to abortion facilities, analyses are based on a generalized difference-in-differences approach. We find that abortion restrictions – alternately measured by the increase in travel distance and by the presence of a near-total ban – significantly increased the rate of IPV for reproductive-age women in treated counties by about seven to 10 percent. These estimates imply at least 9,000 additional incidents of IPV among women in the treated “trigger ban” states, which is predicted to add over $\$1.24$ billion in social costs.
33916.zh_abstract: 美国最高法院2022年具有里程碑意义的多布斯判决推翻了罗诉韦德案，并触发许多州颁布禁止或严格限制堕胎的法律，从而彻底改变了美国生殖健康的格局。先前的研究已强调堕胎限制对女性和家庭的深远影响，这些影响超出了其对堕胎、生育和生育率的直接效应。我们首次提供了关于后多布斯时代堕胎限制如何影响女性遭受亲密伴侣暴力风险的部分因果证据。亲密伴侣暴力是女性经历的最常见暴力形式，而堕胎可及性的变化可能对多种投入因素（经济资源、压力、家庭内部议价能力）产生非预期效应，这些因素可能影响关系动态并增加亲密伴侣暴力风险。利用2017年至2023年向执法部门报告的亲密伴侣暴力事件信息，并结合后多布斯时代县级到堕胎机构的旅行距离变化，我们的分析基于广义双重差分方法。我们发现，堕胎限制——以旅行距离增加和近乎全面禁令的存在作为替代衡量指标——显著使处理县育龄女性的亲密伴侣暴力发生率增加了约7%至10%。这些估计意味着，在实施“触发禁令”的处理州，女性中至少额外发生了9000起亲密伴侣暴力事件，预计将增加超过12.4亿美元的社会成本。
33916.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LE, PE；JEL：I11, I12, I18, J13, K23

33915.title: Defaulting 401(k) Assets into Payout Annuities for “Pretty Good” Lifetime Incomes
33915.zh_title: 将401(k)资产默认配置为支付年金以实现“相当不错”的终身收入
33915.authors: Vanya Horneff, Raimond Maurer, Olivia S. Mitchell
33915.abstract: Some US defined contribution plans offer retirees access to an annuity or lifetime income stream as payout options from their 401(k) accounts. Nevertheless, for behavioral reasons, some retirees may hesitate to elect lifetime income streams as a drawdown vehicle. To counter this, plan sponsors could automatically allocate a portion of retirees’ 401(k) assets to annuities, now that regulatory barriers to doing so have eased. Using a lifecycle economic model, we evaluate the pros and cons of defaulting retirees’ 401(k) assets into payout annuities. We show that defaulting 20% of a retiree’s assets over a threshold into an immediate annuity enhances retirement security for most plan participants. An annuity deferred to the age of 80 is particularly beneficial to college graduates, in terms of enhancing their welfare
33915.zh_abstract: 美国一些固定缴款计划为退休人员提供从其401(k)账户中提取年金或终身收入流的选项。然而，出于行为原因，一些退休人员可能不愿选择终身收入流作为提取工具。为了应对这一问题，计划发起人可以自动将退休人员部分401(k)资产配置为年金，因为现在这样做的监管障碍已经减少。我们使用生命周期经济模型，评估将退休人员401(k)资产默认配置为支付年金的利弊。我们表明，将退休人员超过某一门槛的20%资产默认配置为即期年金，能增强大多数计划参与者的退休保障。对于大学毕业生而言，延迟到80岁开始领取的年金在提升福利方面尤其有益。

33914.title: Firm Investment and the User Cost of Capital: New U.S. Corporate Tax Reform Evidence
33914.zh_title: 企业投资与资本使用成本：来自美国新公司税改革的证据
33914.authors: Jonathan S. Hartley, Kevin A. Hassett, Joshua D. Rauh
33914.abstract: The Tax Cuts and Jobs Act of 2017 (TCJA) marked the first time in three decades that material changes were made to the corporate tax code of the United States. We use TCJA as a quasi natural experiment to estimate the impact of changes in user cost of capital on investment. Following the method of Auerbach and Hassett (1991), using cross-sectional data we find that the user cost is associated with higher rates of investment consistent with previous studies. BEA asset types with greater reductions in user cost of capital and marginal effective tax rate (METR) after the 2017 TCJA had greater statistically significant increases in their investment rates several years after the tax reform. Specifically, we find the magnitude of a 1 percentage point decrease in user cost is associated with a 1.68 to 3.05 percentage point increase in the rate of investment, larger than prior estimates of the responsiveness of investment with respect to user cost of capital.
33914.zh_abstract: 2017年的《减税与就业法案》是美国三十年来首次对公司税法进行重大修改。我们利用《减税与就业法案》作为准自然实验，估计资本使用成本变化对投资的影响。遵循Auerbach和Hassett（1991）的方法，使用横截面数据，我们发现资本使用成本与更高的投资率相关，这与先前的研究一致。在2017年《减税与就业法案》之后，资本使用成本和边际有效税率下降幅度更大的美国经济分析局资产类型，在税改数年后的投资率出现了统计上显著的更大增长。具体而言，我们发现资本使用成本每下降1个百分点，投资率会上升1.68至3.05个百分点，这比先前关于投资对资本使用成本反应程度的估计值更大。

33913.title: Childless or Child-fewer? Childlessness and Parity Progression where Fertility is Below Replacement
33913.zh_title: 无子女还是少子女？生育率低于更替水平下的无子女状况与胎次递进
33913.abstract: Birth rates are falling worldwide, in every region. Falling birth rates can be decomposed into two components: (1) an increase in childlessness (i.e., lifetime nulliparity), and (2) fewer children ever born to women who have at least one child (completed cohort fertility among the parous). This paper quantifies the contributions of these two components for women in advanced economies in Europe, North and South America, and southeast Asia, and for recent cohorts in Indian districts. In both samples, we find that the birth rate among parous women is an important component in explaining low overall birth rates. Childlessness explains only 38% of the decline in cohort fertility in the advanced economies in our analysis. In the Indian context, childlessness accounts for only 6% of the difference between high-fertility and below-replacement districts. Moreover, in many country-cohorts and Indian districts, average completed cohort fertility would be below the replacement threshold even when considering only women who do have children—that is, omitting the zeros from the average. This is in tension with widespread recent narratives that attribute falling birth rates to increasing childlessness: To the contrary, in many populations average birth rates even among parents would be low enough eventually to cause depopulation.
33913.zh_abstract: 全球各地的出生率都在下降。出生率下降可分解为两个组成部分：（1）无子女比例（即终身未生育）的增加，以及（2）至少生育一个子女的女性所生子女数（已育女性的完成队列生育率）的减少。本文量化了这两个组成部分对欧洲、北美和南美以及东南亚发达经济体女性以及印度各地区近期队列的贡献。在这两个样本中，我们发现已育女性的生育率是解释总体低出生率的重要因素。在我们的分析中，无子女仅解释了发达经济体队列生育率下降的38%。在印度背景下，无子女仅解释了高生育率地区与低于更替水平地区之间差异的6%。此外，在许多国家-队列和印度地区，即使只考虑有子女的女性——即从平均值中剔除零值——平均完成队列生育率也低于更替阈值。这与近期广泛流传的将出生率下降归因于无子女增加的说法相矛盾：相反，在许多人群中，即使父母群体的平均生育率也低到足以最终导致人口减少。
33913.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, EH, PE；JEL：I1, J10, J13

33912.title: Wildfire, Smoke and Mental Health in Canada
33912.zh_title: 野火、烟雾与加拿大心理健康
33912.abstract: This study examines the relationship between wildfires and mental health-related hospitalizations in Canada from 2006 to 2018. Most previous estimates of the mental health costs of wildfire have focused on the impacts of exposure to PM₂.₅. We break new ground by highlighting other pathways for wildfires to affect mental health, including evacuation orders, direct local costs of fires, and climate anxiety, which is proxied using wildfire-related Twitter activity. We find that all these mechanisms affect mental health-related hospitalizations, with especially large impacts on hospitalizations for anxiety and substance abuse. Conditional on air quality, wildfire events that draw national attention worsen the mental health of susceptible people, even when they live far away. Elderly people and those with pre-existing health conditions that make them more vulnerable, are more strongly affected. The results indicate that climate anxiety stoked by wildfire events may account for much of the overall mental health cost. Accounting for these additional mechanisms does little to diminish the estimated effect of PM ₂.₅ from wildfire smoke, however, suggesting that the additional factors have effects on mental health that are in addition to those of PM₂.₅.
33912.zh_abstract: 本研究考察了2006年至2018年加拿大野火与心理健康相关住院之间的关系。先前大多数关于野火心理健康成本的估计都集中在PM₂.₅暴露的影响上。我们开辟了新领域，强调了野火影响心理健康的其他途径，包括疏散令、火灾的直接当地成本以及气候焦虑（以野火相关的推特活动作为代理指标）。我们发现，所有这些机制都会影响心理健康相关的住院，对焦虑和药物滥用住院的影响尤其大。在控制空气质量的情况下，引起全国关注的野火事件会恶化易感人群的心理健康，即使他们居住在远离火灾的地方。老年人和已有健康问题使其更脆弱的人群受到的影响更强。结果表明，野火事件引发的气候焦虑可能占总体心理健康成本的很大一部分。然而，考虑这些额外机制并不会削弱野火烟雾中PM₂.₅的估计效应，这表明这些额外因素对心理健康的影响是独立于PM₂.₅之外的。

33911.title: ‘Sorting’ Out Gender Discrimination and Disadvantage: Evidence from Student Evaluations of Teaching
33911.zh_title: “分类”揭示性别歧视与劣势：来自学生教学评价的证据
33911.authors: Sara Ayllón, Lars J. Lefgren, Richard W. Patterson, Olga B. Stoddard, Nicolás Urdaneta Andrade
33911.abstract: How should gender discrimination and systemic disadvantage in teaching evaluations be addressed when more discriminatory and less generous students sort into fields, courses, and instructors’ sections? We estimate student-level measures of gender bias and generosity by comparing how the same student rates male and female instructors, controlling for professor fixed effects. Accounting for measurement error, we document substantial heterogeneity in bias and generosity across students. Bias varies systematically by student gender, and sorting patterns disadvantage female faculty in some courses and male faculty in others. We propose Empirical Bayes–inspired adjustments that correct evaluations for predictable disadvantages caused by student sorting.
33911.zh_abstract: 当更具歧视性和更不慷慨的学生分类进入特定领域、课程和教师班级时，应如何解决教学评价中的性别歧视和系统性劣势？我们通过比较同一名学生如何评价男性和女性教师，并控制教授固定效应，来估计学生层面的性别偏见和慷慨程度指标。在考虑测量误差后，我们记录了学生在偏见和慷慨程度上的显著异质性。偏见因学生性别而系统性地变化，分类模式在某些课程中使女性教师处于劣势，而在其他课程中则使男性教师处于劣势。我们提出了基于经验贝叶斯方法的调整，以纠正因学生分类造成的可预测劣势对评价的影响。

33910.title: Efficiency in Job-Ladder Models
33910.zh_title: 职位阶梯模型中的效率
33910.abstract: This paper examines the efficiency of a decentralized equilibrium in a broad class of random-search job-ladder models. We decompose the source of inefficiency into two margins: (i) the investment margin, that is, the difference between the private and social benefit of job creation given the surplus of a match, and (ii) the valuation margin, that is, the difference between the private valuation and the social valuation of a match surplus. In the presence of on-the-job searches, the well-known Hosios condition no longer guarantees the market equilibrium aligns with the efficient allocation along both margins. On-the-job searches contribute to the overvaluation of the match surplus in market equilibrium, especially at the top of the job ladder. Consequently, the decentralized equilibrium with the Hosios condition features excess creation of vacancies in the steady state. On-the-job searches also lead to excess volatility in unemployment in response to aggregate productivity shocks. Quantitatively, we find a significant difference between the equilibrium outcome and the efficient allocation under standard calibration. We also consider several decentralizations of the efficient allocation to shed light on the optimal policies under the frictional labor market.
33910.zh_abstract: 本文考察了广泛类别的随机搜索职位阶梯模型中分散均衡的效率。我们将低效率的来源分解为两个边际：（i）投资边际，即给定匹配剩余下职位创造的私人收益与社会收益之间的差异，以及（ii）估值边际，即匹配剩余的私人估值与社会估值之间的差异。在存在在职搜索的情况下，著名的Hosios条件不再能保证市场均衡在这两个边际上与有效配置一致。在职搜索导致市场均衡中匹配剩余被高估，尤其是在职位阶梯的顶端。因此，满足Hosios条件的分散均衡在稳态下表现为过度创造职位空缺。在职搜索还导致失业对总生产率冲击的反应出现过度波动。在定量上，我们发现在标准校准下，均衡结果与有效配置之间存在显著差异。我们还考虑了有效配置的几种分散化方式，以揭示摩擦性劳动力市场下的最优政策。

33909.title: How Does Privacy Regulation Affect Transatlantic Venture Investment? Evidence from GDPR
33909.zh_title: 隐私监管如何影响跨大西洋风险投资？来自GDPR的证据
33909.authors: Jian Jia, Ginger Zhe Jin, Mario Leccese, Liad Wagman
33909.abstract: We examine how the GDPR affected transatlantic venture investment. Using investment data from 2014 to 2019, we find that the GDPR’s rollout in May 2018 led to a significant decline in US investor activity in the EU, evidenced by fewer deals and investment, especially for newer and data-related ventures. Investors shifted toward geographically closer ventures and relied more on syndication, particularly with EU-based lead investors. While the shift to local investing drove the overall decline, syndication partially offset it. The results highlight the role of digital policies in shaping investment strategies and influencing transatlantic capital flows.
33909.zh_abstract: 我们考察了《通用数据保护条例》如何影响跨大西洋风险投资。使用2014年至2019年的投资数据，我们发现2018年5月《通用数据保护条例》的实施导致美国投资者在欧盟的活动显著下降，表现为交易和投资减少，尤其是针对较新和数据相关的企业。投资者转向地理上更近的企业，并更多地依赖联合投资，特别是与欧盟主导投资者合作。虽然转向本地投资导致了整体下降，但联合投资部分抵消了这一影响。结果凸显了数字政策在塑造投资策略和影响跨大西洋资本流动中的作用。
33909.meta: Programs：CF, IFM, IO, ITI, LE；JEL：D8, G11, K20

33908.title: Labor Markets in Developing Countries
33908.zh_title: 发展中国家的劳动力市场
33908.abstract: The process of development is accompanied by marked changes in the structure of the labor market. We lay out a broad set of stylized features that distinguish developing country labor markets from those in richer countries. We organize our review around one particularly striking difference: in poor countries, working age individuals are employed in wage work only 20-50% of the time. There is evidence that this low wage employment reflects high levels of involuntary unemployment (often masked by self-employment), along with frictions such as wage rigidity, market power, and search and matching frictions. At the same time, there is growing documentation that workers prefer self-employment or unemployment to many of the wage jobs that are available to them, especially low-skill work in the formal sector. We offer evidence on several ways in which poverty itself can dampen labor supply, so that "low" labor supply may itself be an outcome of under-development. Throughout our review, we highlight how three core aspects of poverty—missing markets, the importance of social ties, and institutional irregularity—are important for understanding why developing country labor markets may behave differently from those in richer settings. This has relevance for understanding how labor markets change in response to, and help facilitate, the process of development.
33908.zh_abstract: 发展过程伴随着劳动力市场结构的显著变化。我们梳理了一系列区分发展中国家与富裕国家劳动力市场的典型特征。我们的综述围绕一个尤为显著的差异展开：在贫困国家，劳动年龄个体仅有20-50%的时间从事有薪工作。有证据表明，这种低水平的有薪就业反映了高水平的非自愿失业（通常被自雇就业所掩盖），以及工资刚性、市场势力和搜寻匹配摩擦等摩擦因素。同时，越来越多的文献显示，工人更偏好自雇就业或失业，而非许多可获得的带薪工作，尤其是正规部门的低技能工作。我们提供了证据，说明贫困本身可能通过多种途径抑制劳动力供给，因此“低”劳动力供给本身可能是欠发展的结果。在整个综述中，我们强调贫困的三个核心方面——市场缺失、社会关系的重要性以及制度不规范——对于理解发展中国家劳动力市场为何可能与富裕国家表现不同至关重要。这对于理解劳动力市场如何响应并促进发展过程具有现实意义。
33908.meta: Programs：DEV, LS；JEL：E24, J22, J23, J31, J63, J64, O15, O17

33907.title: Growth in AI Knowledge
33907.abstract: How does artificial intelligence affect the creation of new knowledge and long-run economic growth? This paper develops a general equilibrium model where AI enhances decision-making by interpolating between existing knowledge points, reducing uncertainty within the boundaries of what is already known. This capability creates competing incentives for knowledge creation: AI makes dense knowledge clusters more valuable by enabling interpolation, but also reduces the penalty for knowledge gaps. We show that AI’s impact on growth depends on a critical threshold in its capabilities. When AI has a modest interpolation range, it encourages incremental research that increases knowledge density, raising growth when ideas are getting harder to find. When AI has an extensive range, it promotes exploratory research that reduces knowledge density, paradoxically slowing growth despite direct productivity gains. The welfare effects depend on both AI capabilities and market structure— monopolistic AI provision can improve welfare by restricting adoption and preventing excessive exploration, while competitive provision amplifies research distortions. These results suggest that policies limiting AI capabilities or promoting market power in AI provision may have unexpected benefits for innovation and growth when research productivity depends on knowledge density.
33907.zh_abstract: 人工智能如何影响新知识的创造和长期经济增长？本文构建了一个一般均衡模型，其中人工智能通过在现有知识点之间进行插值来增强决策能力，从而减少已知边界内的不确定性。这种能力为知识创造创造了相互竞争的激励：人工智能通过实现插值使密集的知识集群更有价值，但也降低了知识空白的代价。我们表明，人工智能对增长的影响取决于其能力的一个关键阈值。当人工智能的插值范围适中时，它会鼓励增加知识密度的渐进式研究，从而在想法越来越难发现时提高增长。当人工智能的范围广泛时，它会促进降低知识密度的探索性研究，尽管有直接的生产率提升，却会矛盾地减缓增长。福利效应取决于人工智能能力和市场结构——垄断性的人工智能供给可以通过限制采用和防止过度探索来改善福利，而竞争性供给则会放大研究扭曲。这些结果表明，当研究生产率依赖于知识密度时，限制人工智能能力或促进人工智能供给市场力量的政策可能对创新和增长产生意想不到的益处。

33906.title: Long-term Vertical Contracts, Geography, and the Persistence of Brand Shares
33906.zh_title: 长期纵向合约、地理因素与品牌份额的持续性
33906.authors: Robert Clark, Jean-François Houde, Xinrong Zhu
33906.abstract: Previous research highlights persistent differences in national brand market shares across regions, driven by geographic consumer preferences and early entry advantages (Bronnenberg et al. 2007, 2009). This study investigates the extent to which long-term vertical contracts can explain the observed geographic dispersion and persistence of national brand dominance. Using NielsenIQ data from the same product categories as Bronnenberg et al. (2007), we follow Abowd et al. (1999) to decompose the variance in brand shares into Brand × Retailer and Brand × Market effects. Results show that 50% of the variance is explained by retailer effects, compared to 20% by market effects. This suggests that some retailers use vertical contracts that favor a specific brand across all markets in which they compete, such as exclusive-dealing, slotting allowances, or category-captaincy contracts, and that these play a key role in sustaining national brand dominance documented in prior literature. By emphasizing how retailer-specific factors drive observed patterns, we complement demand-side explanations and shift attention to supply-side factors that could affect competition.
33906.zh_abstract: 先前的研究强调了全国性品牌市场份额在不同地区间的持续差异，这种差异由地理上的消费者偏好和早期进入优势驱动（Bronnenberg et al. 2007, 2009）。本研究探讨了长期纵向合约在多大程度上可以解释所观察到的全国性品牌主导地位的地理分布和持续性。使用与Bronnenberg等人（2007）相同产品类别的NielsenIQ数据，我们遵循Abowd等人（1999）的方法，将品牌份额的方差分解为品牌×零售商效应和品牌×市场效应。结果显示，50%的方差由零售商效应解释，而市场效应仅解释20%。这表明，一些零售商使用有利于特定品牌的纵向合约（例如独家交易、上架费或品类领航合约），且这些合约在其竞争的所有市场中均适用，从而在维持先前文献所记录的全国性品牌主导地位方面发挥了关键作用。通过强调零售商特定因素如何驱动观察到的模式，我们补充了需求侧的解释，并将注意力转向可能影响竞争的供给侧因素。

33941.title: Expertise
33941.abstract: When job tasks are automated, does this augment or diminish the value of labor in the tasks that remain? We argue the answer depends on whether removing tasks raises or reduces the expertise required for remaining non-automated tasks. Since the same task may be relatively expert in one occupation and inexpert in another, automation can simultaneously replace experts in some occupations while augmenting expertise in others. We propose a conceptual model of occupational task bundling that predicts that changing occupational expertise requirements have countervailing wage and employment effects: automation that decreases expertise requirements reduces wages but permits the entry of less expert workers; automation that raises requirements raises wages but reduces the set of qualified workers. We develop a novel, content-agnostic method for measuring job task expertise, and we use it to quantify changes in occupational expertise demands over four decades attributable to job task removal and addition. We document that automation has raised wages and reduced employment in occupations where it eliminated inexpert tasks, but lowered wages and increased employment in occupations where it eliminated expert tasks. These effects are distinct from—and in the case of employment, opposite to—the effects of changing task quantities. The expertise framework resolves the puzzle of why routine task automation has lowered employment but often raised wages in routine task-intensive occupations. It provides a general tool for analyzing how task automation and new task creation reshape the scarcity value of human expertise within and across occupations.
33941.zh_abstract: 当工作任务被自动化时，这是增强还是削弱了剩余任务中劳动力的价值？我们认为答案取决于移除任务是否提高或降低了剩余非自动化任务所需的专长。由于同一项任务在一个职业中可能相对专业，而在另一个职业中不专业，自动化可以同时取代某些职业中的专家，同时增强其他职业中的专长。我们提出了一个职业任务捆绑的概念模型，该模型预测职业专长要求的变化具有相反的工资和就业效应：降低专长要求的自动化会降低工资，但允许专长较低的工人进入；提高专长要求的自动化会提高工资，但会减少合格工人的数量。我们开发了一种新颖的、与内容无关的方法来衡量工作任务专长，并利用它来量化四十年来因任务移除和添加而导致的职业专长需求变化。我们证明，在消除非专业任务的职业中，自动化提高了工资并减少了就业；但在消除专业任务的职业中，自动化降低了工资并增加了就业。这些效应与任务数量变化的效应不同——就就业而言，甚至相反。专长框架解决了为什么常规任务自动化降低了就业，但往往提高了常规任务密集型职业工资的谜题。它提供了一个通用工具，用于分析任务自动化和新任务创建如何重塑跨职业和职业内部人类专长的稀缺价值。
33941.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PR；JEL：E24, J11, J23, J24

33940.title: Convenience Lost
33940.authors: Zhengyang Jiang, Robert J. Richmond, Tony Zhang
33940.abstract: We show long-term Treasury convenience yields are more sensitive to changes in Treasury supply than short-term Treasury convenience yields. The fiscal expansion in the past two decades and the resultant increase in Treasury supply depressed convenience yields heterogeneously across maturities — driving them close to zero for short-term Treasurys and into negative territory for long-term Treasurys. As a result, the aggregate seigniorage revenue earned by the U.S. from issuing safe and liquid financial assets has declined by a third. Issuing only short-term Treasurys could preserve the seigniorage revenue earned from Treasury convenience yields but would expose the government to more rollover risk.
33940.zh_abstract: 我们证明，长期国债的便利性收益对国债供给变化的敏感度高于短期国债的便利性收益。过去二十年的财政扩张以及由此导致的国债供给增加，在不同期限上不均等地压低了便利性收益——使其在短期国债中趋近于零，在长期国债中则进入负值区间。因此，美国通过发行安全且流动性强的金融资产所获得的总铸币税收入下降了三分之一。仅发行短期国债可以保留从国债便利性收益中获得的铸币税收入，但这会使政府面临更大的展期风险。

33939.title: Production Function Estimation without Invertibility: Imperfectly Competitive Environments and Demand Shocks
33939.zh_title: 无需可逆性的生产函数估计：不完全竞争环境与需求冲击
33939.abstract: We advance the proxy variable approach to production function estimation. We show that the invertibility assumption at its heart is testable. We characterize what goes wrong if invertibility fails and what can still be done. We show that rethinking how the estimation procedure is implemented either eliminates or mitigates the bias that arises if invertibility fails. Furthermore, we show how a modification of the procedure ensures Neyman orthogonality, enhancing efficiency and robustness by rendering the asymptotic distribution of the GMM estimator in the second step of the estimation procedure invariant to estimation noise from the first step.
33939.zh_abstract: 我们推进了生产函数估计的代理变量方法。我们证明，其核心的可逆性假设是可检验的。我们刻画了当可逆性失效时会出现什么问题，以及仍然可以采取哪些措施。我们表明，重新思考估计程序的实施方式可以消除或减轻因可逆性失效而产生的偏差。此外，我们展示了如何通过修改该程序来确保奈曼正交性，通过使估计程序第二步中GMM估计量的渐近分布不受第一步估计噪声的影响，从而提高效率和稳健性。

33938.title: Group Health Insurance Versus ACA Marketplaces: Selection, Subsidies, and Welfare
33938.zh_title: 团体健康保险与ACA市场：选择、补贴与福利
33938.authors: Sebastián Fleitas, Caitlyn Fleming, Gautam Gowrisankaran, Anthony T. Lo Sasso
33938.abstract: The Affordable Care Act (ACA) changed incentives for individual and employer-sponsored insurance. Using unique small group market (SGM) data with detailed claims and enrollment information, we analyze the welfare gains across households in the SGM from alternative formulations of ACA health insurance exchanges (HIXs). Accounting for observable heterogeneity increases estimated demand elasticities. Moving all SGM enrollees to HIXs would reduce equilibrium adverse selection in HIX-type markets, increasing welfare for these households by $\$842$ annually. The majority of households would obtain higher equilibrium welfare from HIXs, stemming from having more choices. Adding the 2014 ACA penalties only modestly decreases adverse selection.
33938.zh_abstract: 《平价医疗法案》改变了对个人保险和雇主提供保险的激励。利用独特的小团体市场数据，其中包含详细的理赔和参保信息，我们分析了ACA健康保险交易所的不同形式对小团体市场中各家庭福利收益的影响。考虑可观测的异质性会提高估计的需求弹性。将所有小团体市场参保者转移到健康保险交易所将减少交易所型市场中的均衡逆向选择，使这些家庭的年福利增加842美元。大多数家庭将从健康保险交易所获得更高的均衡福利，这源于拥有更多的选择。增加2014年ACA罚款仅会适度减少逆向选择。

33937.title: Medical School Closures, Market Adjustment, and Mortality in the Flexner Report Era
33937.zh_title: 医学院关闭、市场调整与弗莱克斯纳报告时代的死亡率
33937.authors: Karen Clay, Grant Miller, Margarita Portnykh, Ethan J. Schmick
33937.abstract: Early twentieth century efforts to overhaul the quality of medical education in the United States (principally between 1905 and 1915 – the “Flexner Report Era”) led to a steep decline in the number of medical schools and medical school graduates. In this paper, we examine the consequences of these medical school closures be- tween 1900 and 1930 for county-level physicians, nurses, and midwives per capita as well as for infant, non-infant, and total mortality. To do so, we construct a school closure intensity measure for all counties in the United States, combining variation in (i) distance from closures, (ii) the historical number of graduates from closing schools, and (iii) the timing of closures. Nearby medical school closures (within 300 miles) led to a 4% reduction in physicians per capita, even after physician market adjustment through physician migration and postponed retirement. Strikingly, we find that medical school closures led infant mortality rates to decline by 8% and non- infant mortality rates to decline by 4%, suggesting that reducing the supply of poorly trained physicians may have reduced mortality.
33937.zh_abstract: 二十世纪初，美国为提高医学教育质量而进行的改革（主要在1905年至1915年间，即“弗莱克斯纳报告时代”）导致医学院和医学院毕业生数量急剧下降。在本文中，我们研究了1900年至1930年间这些医学院关闭对县级人均医生、护士和助产士数量，以及婴儿死亡率、非婴儿死亡率和总死亡率的影响。为此，我们为美国所有县构建了一个医学院关闭强度指标，该指标综合了以下三个方面的变化：(i) 与关闭地点的距离，(ii) 关闭学校的历史毕业生数量，以及(iii) 关闭的时间。附近的医学院关闭（300英里以内）导致人均医生数量减少4%，即使在通过医生迁移和推迟退休进行医生市场调整之后也是如此。引人注目的是，我们发现医学院关闭导致婴儿死亡率下降8%，非婴儿死亡率下降4%，这表明减少训练不足的医生供给可能降低了死亡率。
33937.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, EH；JEL：I11, I18, N31, N32

33936.title: Cosmetology Gets a Trim: The Impact of Reducing Licensing Hours on Colleges and Students
33936.zh_title: 美容业的削减：减少执照学时对学院和学生的影响
33936.authors: Nicolas Acevedo Rebolledo, Kathryn J. Blanchard, Stephanie Riegg Cellini
33936.abstract: In the United States, licenses are required for entry into many different occupations. Requirements vary by state and occupation, but many licenses require a minimum number of training or instructional hours. We consider the impact of these hours requirements on students and postsecondary institutions, with a particular focus on cosmetology (also known as hairstyling or beauty). Cosmetology licensing requires extensive training hours (between 500 and 2,100 hours) in every state and typically exceeds the time required for similar licenses. We implement a difference-in-difference design based on state-level changes in required licensing hours for cosmetologists between 2011 and 2019. We ask how and whether changes to hours requirements influence student outcomes and institutional behavior. We find that lowering required hours is likely beneficial for students, as it raises completion, lowers tuition, and expands enrollment among some groups of students. Larger institutions appear to reduce their tuition by less than smaller institutions. We find no detectable effects on the earnings of cosmetologists.
33936.zh_abstract: 在美国，许多职业的准入都需要执照。各州和职业的要求各不相同，但许多执照要求最低培训或教学时数。我们考虑了这些学时要求对学生和高等教育机构的影响，特别关注美容业（也称为发型设计或美业）。每个州的美容执照都要求大量的培训学时（500至2100小时之间），且通常超过类似执照所需的时间。我们基于2011年至2019年间各州对美容师执照要求学时的变化，实施了一项双重差分设计。我们询问学时要求的变化如何以及是否会影响学生成果和机构行为。我们发现，降低所需学时可能对学生有利，因为它能提高毕业率、降低学费，并扩大部分学生群体的入学人数。大型机构降低学费的幅度似乎小于小型机构。我们没有发现对美容师收入有可检测的影响。
33936.meta: Programs：ED, LS；JEL：I21, I23, I28, J44, J48

33935.title: Health Insurance Protections and Ex Ante Moral Hazard in Risky Health Behaviors
33935.zh_title: 健康保险保护与风险健康行为中的事前道德风险
33935.authors: Barış K. Yörük, Joseph J. Sabia, Tessie Krishna, Dhaval M. Dave
33935.abstract: With the goal of lowering incentives for alcohol and substance abuse, U.S. states have historically permitted private health insurers to deny reimbursement of medical claims stemming from alcohol or opioid impairment. However, a potential unintended consequence of such “exclusion provisions” is that they may reduce providers’ incentives to screen patients for alcohol intoxication and substance abuse, leading to an increase in risky health behaviors that carry substantial externality costs. In response to these concerns, 16 states and the District of Columbia repealed their exclusion provisions and replaced them with explicit prohibitions on the denial of health insurance claims resulting from alcohol and other substance use impairment (PDHIAs). This study is the first to comprehensively explore the effects of PDHIAs on alcohol- and drug- related outcomes, with a particular focus on externalities associated with these risky health behaviors, allowing us to broadly assess their potential welfare effects. Leveraging a variety of national data sources (Uniform Crime Reports, Fatality Analysis Reporting System, Behavioral Risk Factor Surveillance System, Treatment Episode Data Set, and Medical Expenditure Panel Survey) in conjunction with a generalized difference-in-differences approach, we find little support for the hypothesis that PDHIAs generated ex ante moral hazard. To the contrary, there is some evidence that PDHIAs may have reduced some criminal arrests, drunk driving behaviors, and alcohol use. One explanation for these findings is that physicians may be more willing to refer treatment services for substance use-related health issues when patients and hospitals are not financially penalized by PDHIAs. Lastly, there is little evidence that PDHIAs had broader impacts on private insurance markets, either in affecting private health insurance coverage or average premiums.
33935.zh_abstract: 为了降低对酒精和药物滥用的激励，美国各州历史上曾允许私人健康保险公司拒绝赔付因酒精或阿片类药物损伤引起的医疗索赔。然而，这种“排除条款”的一个潜在意外后果是，它们可能降低医疗服务提供者筛查患者酒精中毒和药物滥用的激励，从而导致具有重大外部性成本的风险健康行为增加。针对这些担忧，16个州和哥伦比亚特区废除了其排除条款，取而代之的是明确禁止因酒精和其他药物使用损伤而拒绝健康保险索赔的规定。本研究首次全面探讨了这些禁止因酒精和其他药物使用损伤而拒绝健康保险索赔的规定对酒精和药物相关结果的影响，特别关注与这些风险健康行为相关的外部性，从而使我们能够广泛评估其潜在的福利效应。利用多种国家数据源（统一犯罪报告、致命事故报告系统、行为风险因素监测系统、治疗事件数据集和医疗支出小组调查），并结合广义双重差分方法，我们几乎没有发现支持这些禁止因酒精和其他药物使用损伤而拒绝健康保险索赔的规定产生事前道德风险这一假设的证据。相反，有一些证据表明，这些规定可能减少了某些刑事逮捕、酒后驾驶行为和酒精使用。对这些发现的一种解释是，当患者和医院不因这些禁止因酒精和其他药物使用损伤而拒绝健康保险索赔的规定而受到经济惩罚时，医生可能更愿意为与物质使用相关的健康问题提供治疗服务转诊。最后，几乎没有证据表明这些禁止因酒精和其他药物使用损伤而拒绝健康保险索赔的规定对私人保险市场产生了更广泛的影响，无论是影响私人健康保险覆盖率还是平均保费。
33935.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LE, PE；JEL：I10, I11, I12, I13, I18, K23

33934.title: Transition to Green Technology along the Supply Chain
33934.zh_title: 供应链上的绿色技术转型
33934.authors: Philippe Aghion, Lint Barrage, Eric Donald, David Hémous, Ernest Liu
33934.abstract: We analyze a model of green technological transition along a supply chain. The model generates a unique equilibrium for given initial conditions but multiple steady-states. We show that: (i) even in the presence of Pigouvian environmental taxation, targeted sectoral subsidies are generally necessary to implement the social optimum; (ii) small, targeted industrial policy may bring large welfare gains; (iii) a government which is unable to subsidize greenification in more than one sector or price carbon at its true social cost should primarily target downstream sectors; (iv) over-investing in greenification in the wrong upstream branch may derail the overall transition towards greenification. Finally, we calibrate our model to decarbonization of heavy duty transportation (trucking, aviation, etc.) via hydrogen. We find that, absent industrial policy, the economy can get stuck in the “wrong” steady-state with CO₂ emissions vastly above the social optimum even with a Pigouvian carbon price in place.
33934.zh_abstract: 我们分析了一个沿供应链进行绿色技术转型的模型。该模型在给定初始条件下产生唯一均衡，但存在多个稳态。我们证明：(i) 即使存在庇古式环境税，通常也需要有针对性的部门补贴才能实现社会最优；(ii) 小规模、有针对性的产业政策可能带来巨大的福利收益；(iii) 一个无法补贴超过一个部门的绿色化或无法按真实社会成本对碳定价的政府，应主要针对下游部门；(iv) 在错误的上游分支过度投资绿色化可能会破坏向绿色化的整体转型。最后，我们将模型校准到通过氢能实现重型运输（卡车运输、航空等）脱碳的情景。我们发现，在没有产业政策的情况下，即使存在庇古式碳价，经济也可能陷入“错误”的稳态，二氧化碳排放量远高于社会最优水平。

33933.title: Controlling Collective Attention: Flooding versus Focusing by Politicians
33933.zh_title: 控制集体注意力：政治家的信息泛滥与聚焦策略
33933.abstract: This paper develops a formal model of strategic political communication when citizens have limited attention and heterogeneous inference procedures. A politician privately observes their quality across multiple policy dimensions and must allocate a fixed informational capacity between breadth (number of issues disclosed) and depth (signals per issue). Citizens attend to exactly one dimension and advocate for investigation only when sufficiently suspicious; an investigation is triggered only if enough citizens coordinate on the same issue. We show that high dimensionality with low depth—“flooding the zone”—maximises disagreement among citizens within the feasible (m, n) choices: those attending different issues see small samples and reach divergent conclusions. Politicians with unfavourable information optimally flood when accountability penalties are large, exploiting coordination failures to avoid scrutiny. A key comparative static shows that as accountability penalties rise, the bad type’s optimal breadth is weakly increasing and eventually reaches maximal breadth, exploiting coordination failures to reduce exposure risk. When the good type retains a more concentrated disclosure choice to preserve reputational performance and the possibility of vindication, the resulting equilibrium features action separation in disclosure breadth. The model also admits pooling equilibria in which both types flood and information is abundant but shallow (“transparency theatre”) under the corresponding incentive inequalities. Introducing a mixture of naïve and sophisticated citizens who interpret disclosure strategically changes reputational incentives; we show that equilibria supported by strict inequalities are locally robust to the fraction of sophisticated citizens and that average beliefs vary affinely with this fraction.
33933.zh_abstract: 本文构建了一个当公民注意力有限且具有异质性推断程序时的战略性政治沟通形式化模型。一位政治家私下观察到自己在多个政策维度上的质量，并必须在广度（披露问题的数量）和深度（每个问题的信号数量）之间分配固定的信息容量。公民只关注一个维度，并且只有在足够怀疑时才会主张进行调查；只有当足够多的公民在同一问题上协调一致时，调查才会被触发。我们表明，在可行的（m, n）选择中，高维度与低深度——“信息泛滥”——能最大化公民之间的分歧：关注不同问题的公民看到小样本并得出不同的结论。拥有不利信息的政治家在问责惩罚较大时会最优地选择信息泛滥，利用协调失败来避免审查。一个关键的比较静态分析表明，随着问责惩罚增加，坏类型的最优广度弱递增并最终达到最大广度，利用协调失败来降低暴露风险。当好类型保留更集中的披露选择以维护声誉表现和获得澄清的可能性时，由此产生的均衡在披露广度上具有行动分离特征。该模型也允许混同均衡，在相应的激励不等式下，两种类型都进行信息泛滥，信息丰富但浅薄（“透明度剧场”）。引入混合了天真型和老练型公民（后者会策略性地解读披露）会改变声誉激励；我们表明，由严格不等式支持的均衡对于老练型公民的比例是局部稳健的，并且平均信念随该比例仿射变化。

33932.title: Is Less Really More? Comparing the Climate and Productivity Impacts of a Shrinking Population
33932.zh_title: 少即是多？比较人口萎缩对气候和生产力的影响
33932.authors: Mark Budolfson, Michael Geruso, Kevin J. Kuruc, Dean Spears, Sangita Vyas
33932.abstract: We test the widely shared view that an important benefit of the ongoing, global decline in fertility and population growth will be reductions in long-run temperatures. We assess climate outcomes and average per capita incomes under a baseline scenario of depopulation against a counterfactual in which the world population stabilizes at a level higher than today’s. Although these paths differ by billions of people in 2200, we find that the implied temperatures differ by less than one tenth of a degree C. Timing drives this result. Fertility shifts take generations to meaningfully change population size, by which time per capita emissions are projected to have significantly declined, even under pessimistic policy assumptions. This makes the additional warming from any plausibly sized fertility changes small relative to other well-studied effects of population growth, including non-rival innovation. Moreover, once the possibility of net-negative emissions is accounted for, even the sign of the population-temperature link becomes ambiguous.
33932.zh_abstract: 我们检验了一个广泛持有的观点，即当前全球生育率和人口增长的持续下降将带来长期气温降低的重要益处。我们评估了在人口减少的基准情景下与在人口稳定在高于当前水平的反事实情景下的气候结果和人均平均收入。尽管这些路径在2200年相差数十亿人，但我们发现由此产生的气温差异小于0.1摄氏度。时间因素驱动了这一结果。生育率变化需要几代人才能显著改变人口规模，而到那时，即使在悲观的政策假设下，人均排放量预计也已大幅下降。这使得任何合理规模的生育率变化带来的额外变暖，相对于人口增长的其他经过充分研究的影响（包括非竞争性创新）而言都很小。此外，一旦考虑到净负排放的可能性，人口与气温之间联系的符号甚至变得模糊。
33932.meta: Programs：AG, CH, DEV, EEE, PE, PR；JEL：J11, J13, O30, O40, Q54

33931.title: The Longevity of Older Wives and Their Husbands: Comparing Actual Couples with Synthetic Couples
33931.zh_title: 年长妻子及其丈夫的寿命：比较实际夫妻与合成夫妻
33931.authors: Janice Compton, Robert A. Pollak, Seth G. Sanders
33931.abstract: Using data from the National Health Interview Survey (NHIS), we construct two measures of the longevity of older wives and husbands. For definiteness, we focus on couples in which the wife was 60 and the husband 62 in 1988. Our first measure utilizes a 4 x 4 "longevity matrix" in which the bins correspond to the decades in which the spouses died. For example, an entry in the (3,2) bin indicates that the wife died in the 3rd decade (between ages 80 and 89) and the husband in the second decade (between ages 72 and 81). Our second measures use the Gompertz distribution to estimate the censored observations from the NHIS. We use the Gompertz estimates of age-specific mortalities to construct joint and survivor life expectancies for the couples in our working sample. We compare the longevity estimates based on actual couples from the NHIS with estimates based on synthetic couples constructed from the 1988 CDC life tables. Research based on randomly formed synthetic couples constructed from CDC life table data shows that the randomness of mortality and the overlap between spouses' age-specific mortality distributions imply dramatically long life spans for surviving spouses. The 4 x 4 longevity matrices show that longevity effects are magnified at the level of the couple by assortative marriage.
33931.zh_abstract: 利用全国健康访谈调查（NHIS）的数据，我们构建了年长妻子和丈夫寿命的两种度量。为明确起见，我们聚焦于1988年妻子60岁、丈夫62岁的夫妻。我们的第一种度量使用一个4×4的“寿命矩阵”，其中单元格对应配偶去世的十年区间。例如，(3,2)单元格中的条目表示妻子在第三个十年（80至89岁之间）去世，丈夫在第二个十年（72至81岁之间）去世。我们的第二种度量使用冈珀茨分布来估计NHIS中的删失观测值。我们利用冈珀茨估计的年龄别死亡率，为工作样本中的夫妻构建联合和遗属预期寿命。我们将基于NHIS实际夫妻的寿命估计与基于1988年CDC生命表构建的合成夫妻的估计进行比较。基于从CDC生命表数据随机形成的合成夫妻的研究表明，死亡率的随机性以及配偶年龄别死亡率分布之间的重叠意味着遗属配偶的寿命极长。4×4寿命矩阵显示，通过选型婚姻，寿命效应在夫妻层面被放大。
33931.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS；JEL：J10, J12, J14, J19

33930.title: The Labor Supply Curve is Upward Sloping: The Effects of Immigrant-Induced Demand Shocks
33930.zh_title: 劳动力供给曲线是向上倾斜的：移民引发的需求冲击的影响
33930.authors: Sigurd Galaasen, Andreas R. Kostøl, Joan Monras, Jonathan Vogel
33930.abstract: What is the effect of immigration on native labor-market outcomes? An extensive literature identifies the differential impact of immigration on natives employed in jobs that are more exposed to immigrant labor (supply exposure). But immigrants consume in addition to producing output. Despite this, no literature identifies the impact on natives employed in jobs that are more exposed to immigrant consumption (demand exposure). We study native labor-market effects of supply and demand exposures to immigration. Theoretically, we formalize both measures of exposure and solve for their effects on native wages. Empirically, we combine employer-employee data with a newly collected dataset covering electronic payments for the universe of residents in Norway to measure supply and demand exposures of native workers to immigration over the period 2000-2015, surrounding EU expansions that begin in 2004. We find large, positive, and persistent differential effects of demand exposure on native worker income. Finally, we embed our qualitative theory into a quantitative framework, choose model elasticities to match our empirical estimates, and measure real wage changes for natives.
33930.zh_abstract: 移民对本土劳动力市场结果的影响是什么？大量文献识别了移民对从事更易受移民劳动力影响的岗位（供给暴露）的本土工人的差异化影响。但移民除了生产产出外还进行消费。尽管如此，没有文献识别移民对从事更易受移民消费影响的岗位（需求暴露）的本土工人的影响。我们研究了供给和需求暴露于移民对本土劳动力市场的影响。理论上，我们形式化了这两种暴露度量，并求解了它们对本土工资的影响。实证上，我们将雇主-雇员数据与涵盖挪威全体居民电子支付的新收集数据集相结合，以衡量2000-2015年期间（围绕2004年开始的欧盟扩张）本土工人对移民的供给和需求暴露。我们发现需求暴露对本土工人收入具有巨大、正向且持续的差异化影响。最后，我们将我们的定性理论嵌入一个定量框架，选择模型弹性以匹配我们的实证估计，并衡量本土工人的实际工资变化。

33929.title: Macro Shocks and Firm-Level Response Heterogeneity
33929.zh_title: 宏观冲击与企业层面反应的异质性
33929.authors: Steven J. Davis, Stephen Hansen, Cristhian Seminario-Amez
33929.abstract: Macro shocks produce high dispersion in firm-level equity returns, sales growth, and other outcomes. We show that this dispersion reflects observable differences in business characteristics. To do so, we combine firm-level returns on stock market ``jump" days with text about business risks in prior 10-K filings to construct firm-specific shock exposures. Our exposure measures explain firm-level abnormal returns through interpretable variation in language. They also explain most of the increased dispersion in firm-level revenue growth after major shocks and much of the dispersion in employment growth, investment rates, and earnings surprises. Our evidence yields a novel interpretation for countercyclical dispersion, highlighting the key role of heterogeneous business characteristics in macro shock transmission.
33929.zh_abstract: 宏观冲击在企业层面的股票回报、销售增长和其他结果中产生高度离散性。我们表明，这种离散性反映了商业特征的可观测差异。为此，我们将股票市场“跳跃”日的企业层面回报与先前10-K文件中关于商业风险的文本相结合，构建了企业特定的冲击暴露度。我们的暴露度量通过语言中可解释的变异解释了企业层面的异常回报。它们还解释了重大冲击后企业层面收入增长离散性增加的大部分，以及就业增长、投资率和盈利惊喜离散性的很大一部分。我们的证据为反周期离散性提供了一种新的解释，强调了异质性商业特征在宏观冲击传导中的关键作用。

33928.title: Economic Models of Cultural Transmission
33928.abstract: In this chapter we survey recent advances in modeling cultural transmission in the economics literature. We first present the basic canonical model of the evolution of cultural traits in the social sciences. Both Economics and Evolutionary anthropology build on this canonical model but their approaches are conceptually very different. After elucidating these differences, we introduce several recent economic models of cultural transmission which address a rich set of novel and interesting questions in the literature. We present these models as extensions of the canonical framework, organized along theoretical dimensions that we categorize as pertaining to preferences and technology. We finally briefly discuss how cultural evolution represents a fundamental component - alongside institutional change - of recent theoretical work on the political economy of long-run growth. We conclude suggesting interesting areas for future research.
33928.zh_abstract: 在本章中，我们综述了经济学文献中文化传播建模的最新进展。我们首先介绍社会科学中文化特征演化的基本经典模型。经济学和进化人类学都建立在这个经典模型之上，但它们的处理方法在概念上截然不同。在阐明这些差异之后，我们介绍了几种最近的文化传播经济模型，这些模型解决了文献中一系列丰富新颖且有趣的问题。我们将这些模型呈现为经典框架的扩展，按照我们归类为偏好和技术的理论维度进行组织。最后，我们简要讨论了文化演化如何与制度变迁一起，成为近期关于长期增长的政治经济学理论工作的基本组成部分。我们提出未来研究的有趣领域作为结论。
33928.meta: Programs：CH, POL；JEL：C60, D1, N0, P0, Z10, Z13

33980.title: Coordination and Cooperation
33980.abstract: An extensive experimental literature has documented miscoordination in establishing cooperative relationships when they can be supported in indefinitely repeated games: some people systematically try to cooperate, while others do not. The literature has had little success in finding personal characteristics that correlate systematically with these behaviors. We show that subjects who play the risky but efficient action in a simple coordination game (i.e., play stag in a stag hunt game) are significantly more likely to cooperate in indefinitely repeated games. This suggests that subjects who are less susceptible to strategic uncertainty are more likely to attempt to establish cooperative relationships.
33980.zh_abstract: 大量实验文献记录了在无限重复博弈中建立合作关系时出现的协调失败现象：一些人系统性地尝试合作，而另一些人则不然。文献在寻找与这些行为系统相关的个人特征方面收效甚微。我们表明，在简单协调博弈中选择冒险但高效行动（即在猎鹿博弈中选择猎鹿）的受试者，在无限重复博弈中显著更有可能合作。这表明，对战略不确定性较不敏感的受试者更有可能尝试建立合作关系。

33979.title: Attribute Production and Biased Technical Change in Automobiles
33979.zh_title: 汽车中的属性生产与有偏技术变革
33979.abstract: Cars have gotten bigger and faster yet more fuel efficient in recent decades. Why? We estimate an equilibrium model of car attribute production using U.S. household microdata for 1995–2017 and structurally decompose attribute trends into underlying mechanisms. We find that technical change led to gains in all attributes. Rising gas prices boosted efficiency but were offset by surging demand for size and acceleration. Efficiency standards were largely ineffective. We show that using technology alone to meet tighter standards quadruples compliance costs, while half the efficiency gain from a fuel-saving technology subsidy is reallocated to other attributes in equilibrium.
33979.zh_abstract: 近几十年来，汽车变得更大、更快，同时也更省油。这是为什么？我们利用1995-2017年美国住户微观数据估计了一个汽车属性生产的均衡模型，并从结构上分解属性趋势背后的潜在机制。我们发现技术变革带来了所有属性的提升。汽油价格上涨提高了效率，但被对尺寸和加速性能的激增需求所抵消。能效标准在很大程度上是无效的。我们表明，仅依靠技术来满足更严格的标准会使合规成本增加四倍，而燃油节约技术补贴所带来的一半效率提升在均衡中被重新分配给了其他属性。

33978.title: How Does Wage Inequality Affect the Labor Movement?
33978.zh_title: 工资不平等如何影响劳工运动？
33978.authors: Barbara Biasi, Zoë B. Cullen, Julia H. Gilman, Nina Roussille
33978.abstract: This paper provides causal evidence on how wage inequality among workers affects the labor movement using three complementary research designs: a vignette experiment with union organizers, a natural policy experiment that increased wage inequality among Wisconsin school teachers, and an information intervention during the 2023 Writers Guild of America strike. Across all studies, we find that inequality undermines union strength through multiple channels. First, workers with high individual bargaining power are more likely to withdraw support in unequal environments, preferring individual over collective bargaining. Second, union organizers strategically respond to inequality in ways that may preserve membership but limit redistribution, such as shifting their campaign away from wages and choosing smaller, more homogeneous bargaining units. Taken together, our findings highlight the potential for “inequality traps,” where rising inequality erodes the very institutions designed to counteract it.
33978.zh_abstract: 本文利用三种互补的研究设计，提供了关于工人之间工资不平等如何影响劳工运动的因果证据：一项与工会组织者进行的场景实验，一项增加了威斯康星州学校教师工资不平等的自然政策实验，以及2023年美国编剧协会罢工期间的一项信息干预。在所有研究中，我们发现不平等通过多种渠道削弱了工会力量。首先，在不平等环境中，拥有较高个人议价能力的工人更有可能撤回支持，倾向于个人而非集体谈判。其次，工会组织者会战略性地应对不平等，其方式可能维持会员数量但限制再分配，例如将竞选活动从工资议题转移开，并选择更小、更同质的谈判单位。综合来看，我们的发现凸显了“不平等陷阱”的可能性，即日益加剧的不平等侵蚀了旨在抵消不平等的制度本身。

33977.title: Money or Monitoring: Evidence on Improving Worker Effort
33977.zh_title: 金钱还是监督：关于提高工人努力程度的证据
33977.authors: Jing Cai, Sai Luo, Shing-Yi Wang
33977.abstract: Higher compensation and increased monitoring are two common strategies for addressing the moral hazard problem between firms and workers. In a field experiment with new hires at an automobile manufacturing firm in China, we randomly varied both signing bonuses and monitoring intensity. Both interventions increased worker output but through different channels: signing bonuses led to longer working hours without significant gains in performance, while enhanced monitoring improved performance as evaluated by managers. Additionally, bonuses reduced quit rates, whereas monitoring raised them. These results suggest that firms should carefully consider their primary objectives and weigh these trade-offs when designing optimal labor contracts.
33977.zh_abstract: 提高薪酬和加强监督是解决企业与工人之间道德风险问题的两种常见策略。在一项针对中国某汽车制造企业新员工的实地实验中，我们随机改变了签约奖金和监督强度。两种干预措施都提高了工人产出，但通过不同的渠道：签约奖金导致工作时间延长，但绩效没有显著提高；而加强监督则提高了管理者评估的绩效。此外，奖金降低了离职率，而监督则提高了离职率。这些结果表明，企业在设计最优劳动合同时应仔细考虑其主要目标并权衡这些取舍。
33977.meta: Programs：DEV, LS；JEL：C93, J24, J30, M52, O15

33976.title: State of the Art: Economic Development Through the Lens of Paintings
33976.zh_title: 艺术之镜：通过绘画看经济发展
33976.authors: Clément Gorin, Stephan Heblich, Yanos Zylberberg
33976.abstract: This paper analyzes 630,000 paintings from 1400 onward to uncover how visual art reflects its socioeconomic context. We develop a learning algorithm to predict nine basic emotions conveyed in each painting and isolate a context effect—the emotional signal shared across artworks created in the same location and year—controlling for artist, genre, and epoch-specific influences. These emotion distributions encode subtle but meaningful information about the living standards, uncertainty, or inequality characterizing the context in which the artworks were produced. We propose this emotion-based measure, derived from historical artworks, as a novel lens to examine how societies experienced major socioeconomic transformations, including climate variability, trade dynamics, technological change, shifts in knowledge production, and political transitions.
33976.zh_abstract: 本文分析了自1400年以来的63万幅绘画，以揭示视觉艺术如何反映其社会经济背景。我们开发了一种学习算法来预测每幅画中传达的九种基本情感，并分离出一种情境效应——即在相同地点和年份创作的艺术品之间共享的情感信号，同时控制艺术家、流派和特定时代的影响。这些情感分布编码了关于艺术品创作背景的生活水平、不确定性或不平等性的微妙但有意义的信息。我们提出这种基于历史艺术品的情感度量，作为考察社会如何经历重大社会经济转型（包括气候变率、贸易动态、技术变革、知识生产转变和政治转型）的新视角。

33975.title: Eurosclerosis at 40: Labor Market Institutions, Dynamism, and European Competitiveness
33975.zh_title: 四十年的欧洲硬化症：劳动力市场制度、活力与欧洲竞争力
33975.abstract: This paper explores a repositioning of Europe’s labor market institutions as potential drivers of the transatlantic gap in macroeconomic performance. Institutional diagnoses were prominent in times of high European unemployment in the 1980-90s. But interest waned as joblessness fell—even though the decline was uneven, precarious work arrangements have grown, and labor markets remain largely unreformed (unlike product and financial markets). Yet, rigid labor market institutions might continue to matter because they can stifle labor market and business dynamism: Europeans switch jobs much less frequently, and restructuring is much rarer. Recent research argues that such immobility impedes wage and productivity growth. Moreover, this low dynamism might contribute to Europe’s specific underperformance in tech, R&D, disruptive innovation, ICT adoption—where creative destruction requires fluid reallocation. This institutional labor market perspective on European competitiveness complements prevailing diagnoses focused on capital and product market fragmentation. Tight labor markets, lower unemployment, and shrinking labor supply might keep this nexus timely.
33975.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了将欧洲劳动力市场制度重新定位为跨大西洋宏观经济表现差距的潜在驱动因素。在1980-90年代欧洲高失业时期，制度诊断曾备受关注。但随着失业率下降，人们的兴趣减弱——尽管失业率下降并不均衡，不稳定的工作安排有所增加，且劳动力市场在很大程度上仍未改革（与产品和金融市场不同）。然而，僵化的劳动力市场制度可能仍然重要，因为它们会抑制劳动力市场和商业活力：欧洲人换工作的频率低得多，企业重组也少得多。最近的研究认为，这种不流动性阻碍了工资和生产率增长。此外，这种低活力可能导致欧洲在科技、研发、颠覆性创新、ICT应用等领域的特定表现不佳——在这些领域，创造性破坏需要流动性的重新配置。这种关于欧洲竞争力的制度性劳动力市场视角，补充了当前侧重于资本和产品市场碎片化的诊断。紧张的劳动力市场、较低的失业率和萎缩的劳动力供给可能使这种关联保持时效性。
33975.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, LS, PE, POL, PR；JEL：E0, J0, O0

33974.title: Firewood in the American Economy: 1700 to 2010.
33974.zh_title: 美国经济中的木柴：1700年至2010年
33974.abstract: Despite the central role of firewood in the development of the early American economy, prices for this energy fuel are absent from official government statistics and the scholarly literature. This paper presents the most comprehensive dataset of firewood prices in the United States compiled to date, encompassing over 6,000 price quotes from 1700 to 2010. Between 1700 and 2010, real firewood prices increased by between 0.2% and 0.4%, annually, and from 1800 to the Civil War, real prices increased especially rapidly, between 0.7% and 1% per year. Rising firewood prices and falling coal prices led to the transition to coal as the primary energy fuel. Between 1860 and 1890, the income elasticity for firewood switched from 0.5 to -0.5. Beginning in the last decade of the 18th century, firewood output increased from about 18% of GDP to just under 30% of GDP in the 1830s. The value of firewood fell to less than 5% of GDP by the 1880s. Prior estimates of firewood output in the 19th century significantly underestimated its value. Finally, incorporating the new estimates of firewood output into agricultural production leads to higher estimates of agricultural productivity growth prior to 1860 than previously reported in the literature.
33974.zh_abstract: 尽管木柴在美国早期经济发展中扮演核心角色，但这种能源燃料的价格在官方政府统计数据和学术文献中却缺失。本文提供了迄今为止最全面的美国木柴价格数据集，涵盖了从1700年到2010年的6000多个报价。在1700年至2010年间，实际木柴价格每年上涨0.2%至0.4%；从1800年到内战期间，实际价格增长尤为迅速，每年在0.7%至1%之间。木柴价格上涨和煤炭价格下跌导致了向煤炭作为主要能源燃料的转型。在1860年至1890年间，木柴的收入弹性从0.5变为-0.5。从18世纪最后十年开始，木柴产出从约占GDP的18%增加到19世纪30年代的略低于30%。到19世纪80年代，木柴价值降至GDP的不到5%。先前对19世纪木柴产出的估计显著低估了其价值。最后，将木柴产出的新估计纳入农业生产，会导致1860年之前的农业生产力增长率高于文献先前报告的水平。
33974.meta: Programs：DAE, EEE；JEL：N11, N12, N51, N52, N71, N72, Q23

33973.title: The Political Economy of Stimulus Transfers
33973.zh_title: 刺激转移支付的政治经济学
33973.abstract: Stimulus transfers are widely used during economic downturns, yet they are often poorly targeted from an economic perspective. I show that political incentives might help explain this discrepancy. I study one of the largest stimulus tax credits in Italy which excluded the poorest individuals and targeted middle-income earners.
