Leveraging quasi-random geographic variation in recipient shares and a difference-in-differences design, I find that the transfer raised the incumbent party’s vote share by 0.18 percentage points per 1 pp rise in recipients. These gains persist for at least five years. Political returns are stronger in areas with relatively richer beneficiaries, despite weaker consumption responses, and electoral punishment for exclusion is similarly asymmetric: higher-income excluded individuals reduce support for the incumbent, while poorer excluded individuals do not. Voters also punish incumbents when transfers are revoked, helping explain why temporary programs are rarely repealed. A counterfactual transfer targeting poorer households would have increased the consumption response by 30\\% but reduced electoral returns by at least 15\\%. These findings highlight a key political-economy trade-off in stimulus design, where electoral incentives skew transfers toward politically responsive recipients, as opposed to consumption responsive recipients. JEL: D72, H23, H53, I38, O15.
33973.zh_abstract: 刺激转移支付在经济衰退期间被广泛使用，但从经济角度来看，它们往往瞄准不当。我表明政治激励可能有助于解释这种差异。我研究了意大利最大的刺激税收抵免之一，该抵免排除了最贫困的个人，而针对中等收入者。利用受益者份额的准随机地理差异和双重差分设计，我发现转移支付使执政党的得票率每增加1个百分点（受益者比例）上升0.18个百分点。这些收益至少持续五年。政治回报在受益者相对较富裕的地区更强，尽管消费反应较弱，而排斥的选举惩罚同样不对称：被排除的较高收入者减少对执政党的支持，而被排除的较贫困者则不会。当转移支付被撤销时，选民也会惩罚执政者，这有助于解释为什么临时项目很少被废除。一项针对较贫困家庭的反事实转移支付将使消费反应增加30%，但会使选举回报至少减少15%。这些发现突显了刺激设计中一个关键的政治经济学权衡，即选举激励将转移支付偏向于政治上有回应的受益者，而非消费上有回应的受益者。JEL: D72, H23, H53, I38, O15。
33973.meta: Programs：EFG, LE, PE, POL；JEL：D72, H23, H53, I38

33972.title: The Power Asymmetry in Fuzzy Regression Discontinuity Designs
33972.zh_title: 模糊断点回归设计中的权力不对称性
33972.authors: Daniel Kaliski, Michael P. Keane, Timothy Neal
33972.abstract: In a fuzzy regression discontinuity (RD) design, the probability of treatment jumps when a running variable (R) passes a threshold (R0). Fuzzy RD estimates are obtained via a procedure analogous to two-stage least squares (2SLS), where an indicator I(R > R0) plays the role of the instrument. Recently, Keane and Neal (2023, 2024) showed that 2SLS t-tests suffer from a “power asymmetry”: 2SLS standard errors are spuriously small (large) when the 2SLS estimate is close to (far from) the OLS estimate. Here, we show that a similar problem arises in Fuzzy RD. Hence, if the endogeneity bias is positive, the Fuzzy RD t-test has little power to detect true negative effects, and inflated power to find false positives. The problem persists even if the instrument is very strong. To avoid this problem one should rely exclusively on the intent-to-treat (ITT) regression to assess significance of the treatment effect.
33972.zh_abstract: 在模糊断点回归设计中，当运行变量R超过阈值R0时，接受处理的概率会发生跳跃。模糊断点回归的估计通过类似于两阶段最小二乘法的程序获得，其中指标I(R > R0)充当工具变量。最近，Keane和Neal（2023, 2024）指出，两阶段最小二乘法的t检验存在“权力不对称性”：当两阶段最小二乘估计值接近（远离）普通最小二乘估计值时，两阶段最小二乘标准误会虚假地偏小（偏大）。在此，我们表明模糊断点回归中也存在类似问题。因此，如果内生性偏差为正，模糊断点回归的t检验检测真实负效应的能力很弱，而发现假阳性结果的能力却增强。即使工具变量非常强，该问题依然存在。为避免此问题，应完全依赖意向性治疗回归来评估处理效应的显著性。

33971.title: How the 1942 Japanese Exclusion Impacted U.S. Agriculture
33971.zh_title: 1942年日裔美国人驱逐对美国农业的影响
33971.abstract: In the early 1940s, Japanese American farmers represented a highly skilled segment of the agricultural workforce in the Western United States, characterized by higher education levels and more specialized farming expertise than U.S.-born farmers. During World War II, around 110,000 Japanese Americans (and 22,000 agricultural workers among them) were forcibly relocated from an “exclusion zone” along the West Coast to internment camps. Most never returned to farming. Using county-level panel data from historical agricultural censuses and a triple-difference (DDD) estimation approach we find that, by 1960, counties in the exclusion zone experienced 12% lower cumulative growth in assessed farm value for each percentage point reduction of their 1940 share of Japanese farm workers, relative to counties outside the exclusion zone. These counties also lagged in farm revenues, adoption of high-value crops, mechanization, and adoption of commercial fertilizer. We present suggestive evidence of broader negative spillovers to local economic growth beyond the agricultural sector. Taken together, our findings highlight the long-run economic costs of this policy, illustrating how the loss of skilled farmers can reduce agricultural growth and, in a time of fast technological adoption, may have negative effects on the whole regional development.
33971.zh_abstract: 在20世纪40年代初期，日裔美国农民代表了美国西部农业劳动力中技能高度娴熟的一部分，其特点是比美国本土出生的农民拥有更高的教育水平和更专业的农业专长。二战期间，大约11万日裔美国人（其中包括2.2万农业工人）被强制从西海岸的“排除区”迁往拘留营。大多数人再也没有回到农业领域。利用历史农业普查的县级面板数据和三重差分估计方法，我们发现，到1960年，相对于排除区外的县，排除区内每减少一个百分点1940年日裔农业工人占比，其评估农场价值的累计增长就会低12%。这些县在农场收入、高价值作物采用、机械化和商业肥料使用方面也落后。我们提出了暗示性证据，表明存在超出农业部门、对当地经济增长更广泛的负面溢出效应。综合来看，我们的研究结果凸显了这一政策的长期经济成本，说明了熟练农民的流失如何减缓农业增长，并在技术快速采用的时代可能对整个区域发展产生负面影响。

33970.title: Economics of Childbearing: Trends, Progress, and Challenges
33970.zh_title: 生育经济学：趋势、进展与挑战
33970.abstract: The neoclassical economics of childbearing turns 65 this year, marking the anniversary of Gary Becker’s foundational article on the subject in 1960. This review article begins with a study of how childbearing has evolved in the United States over the last century, identifying distinctive features of the post-1960 era. Next, the article discusses standard neoclassical models of childbearing and shows how augmenting them with a supply side, which includes access to and information about contraception and abortion, increases their explanatory power. After reviewing recent quasi-experimental research testing this augmented model, the final part of the article reflects upon the implications of the recent transformation in US fertility rates for women and children and suggests fruitful avenues for future research.
33970.zh_abstract: 新古典主义生育经济学今年已满65岁，这标志着加里·贝克尔于1960年发表该主题奠基性文章以来的周年纪念。这篇综述文章首先研究了过去一个世纪美国生育率的演变，识别出1960年后时代的独特特征。接着，文章讨论了标准的新古典主义生育模型，并展示了如何通过纳入供给侧（包括避孕和堕胎的可及性与信息）来增强其解释力。在回顾了检验这一增强模型的近期准实验研究后，文章的最后部分反思了近期美国生育率转变对妇女和儿童的影响，并为未来研究提出了富有成效的方向。

33969.title: Accounting Standards and Antidumping Investigations
33969.zh_title: 会计准则与反倾销调查
33969.authors: Stephen Teng. Sun, Shang-Jin Wei, Jin Xie
33969.abstract: We uncover a new real effect of harmonizing accounting standards on international trade: following a mandatory adoption of International Financial Reporting Standards, exporters experiencing a greater change in reporting requirements become more successful in defending against foreign antidumping cases. The effect is also stronger with better reporting enforcement and is robust to excluding exporters from non-market economies. We discuss channels through which accounting-standards globalization facilitates efficient trade by either mitigating importing countries’ protectionism or curtailing exporters’ dumping activities.
33969.zh_abstract: 我们揭示了协调会计准则对国际贸易的一个新的实际影响：在强制采用国际财务报告准则后，报告要求变化较大的出口商在应对外国反倾销案件时变得更加成功。这一效应在报告执行力度更强的情况下也更为显著，并且在对非市场经济体的出口商进行排除后依然稳健。我们讨论了会计准则全球化通过减轻进口国保护主义或遏制出口商倾销活动来促进高效贸易的渠道。

33968.title: A Macroeconomic Model of Central Bank Digital Currency
33968.zh_title: 中央银行数字货币的宏观经济模型
33968.authors: Pascal Paul, Mauricio Ulate, Jing Cynthia Wu
33968.abstract: We develop a quantitative New Keynesian DSGE model with monopolistic banks to study the macroeconomic effects of introducing a central bank digital currency (CBDC). Households benefit from an expansion of liquidity services and higher deposit rates as bank deposit market power is curtailed, while bank profits and lending decline. We quantify this trade-off across economies that differ in their level of interest rates. We find substantial welfare gains from introducing a CBDC with an optimal rate that can be approximated by a simple rule of thumb: the maximum of 0% and the policy rate minus 1%.
33968.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个包含垄断银行的数量化新凯恩斯动态随机一般均衡模型，以研究引入中央银行数字货币的宏观经济效应。随着银行存款市场势力受到抑制，家庭从流动性服务扩张和更高存款利率中受益，而银行利润和贷款则下降。我们在不同利率水平的经济体之间量化了这一权衡。我们发现，引入具有最优利率的中央银行数字货币能带来显著的福利收益，该最优利率可以通过一个简单的经验法则近似：0%与政策利率减去1%中的最大值。
33968.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E3, E4, E5, G21, G51

33967.title: Mergers and Quality Provision in Healthcare: Evidence from Nursing Homes
33967.zh_title: 医疗保健中的并购与质量提供：来自养老院的证据
33967.authors: Pinka Chatterji, Chun-Yu Ho, Wenqing Li
33967.abstract: This paper tests whether mergers between nursing home chains and independent facilities affect quality of care using facility-level data from 1999-2019. Staggered difference-in-differences estimates suggest that acquired facilities experience a 5% reduction in health deficiency citations 2 years post-merger. This improvement relies on the continuous supply of efficiency from chains; persists for four years; and is specific to mergers between chains and independent homes. Quality effects are driven by mergers involving smaller, higher-quality and non-private-equity-owned chains. A structural model suggests that the quality effect is generated by enhanced cost efficiency achieved by facilities serving larger numbers of residents after mergers.
33967.zh_abstract: 本文利用1999年至2019年的设施层面数据，检验了养老院连锁机构与独立设施之间的并购是否影响护理质量。交错双重差分估计表明，被收购设施在并购后两年内健康缺陷引用数量减少了5%。这一改善依赖于连锁机构持续提供的效率；持续四年；并且特定于连锁机构与独立养老院之间的并购。质量效应由涉及规模较小、质量较高且非私募股权拥有的连锁机构的并购驱动。一个结构模型表明，质量效应源于并购后服务更多居民设施所实现的成本效率提升。

33966.title: Moment Restrictions for Nonlinear Panel Data Models with Feedback
33966.zh_title: 具有反馈的非线性面板数据模型的矩约束
33966.authors: Stéphane Bonhomme, Kevin Dano, Bryan S. Graham
33966.abstract: Many panel data methods, while allowing for general dependence between covariates and time-invariant agent-specific heterogeneity, place strong a priori restrictions on feedback: how past outcomes, covariates, and heterogeneity map into future covariate levels. Ruling out feedback entirely, as often occurs in practice, is unattractive in many dynamic economic settings. We provide a general characterization of all feedback and heterogeneity robust (FHR) moment conditions for nonlinear panel data models and present constructive methods to derive feasible moment-based estimators for specific models. We also use our moment characterization to compute semiparametric efficiency bounds, allowing for a quantification of the information loss associated with accommodating feedback, as well as providing insight into how to construct estimators with good efficiency properties in practice. Our results apply both to the finite dimensional parameter indexing the parametric part of the model as well as to estimands that involve averages over the distribution of unobserved heterogeneity. We illustrate our methods by providing a complete characterization of all FHR moment functions in the multi-spell mixed proportional hazards model. We compute efficient moment functions for both model parameters and average effects in this setting.
33966.zh_abstract: 许多面板数据方法虽然允许协变量与个体特定时不变异质性之间存在一般依赖关系，但对反馈（即过去的结果、协变量和异质性如何映射到未来的协变量水平）施加了强烈的先验限制。完全排除反馈（这在实践中经常发生）在许多动态经济环境中并不理想。我们为非线性面板数据模型提供了所有反馈和异质性稳健矩条件的一般刻画，并提出了为特定模型推导可行矩估计量的构造性方法。我们还利用我们的矩刻画计算了半参数效率界，从而能够量化适应反馈所带来的信息损失，并为实践中如何构建具有良好效率性质的估计量提供见解。我们的结果既适用于索引模型参数部分的有限维参数，也适用于涉及未观测异质性分布平均值的估计目标。我们通过为多阶段混合比例风险模型提供所有反馈和异质性稳健矩函数的完整刻画来说明我们的方法。我们在此设定下计算了模型参数和平均效应的有效矩函数。
33966.meta: Programs：IO, LS, TWP；JEL：C01, C14, C33, C41

33965.title: Common Ownership Around the World
33965.zh_title: 全球范围内的共同所有权
33965.authors: Miguel Antón, Florian Ederer, Mireia Giné, Guillermo Ramirez-Chiang
33965.abstract: We study common ownership in 49 countries from 2005 to 2019 and show that it is pervasive and rising around the world. However, despite this global growth, common ownership is still considerably lower in all countries compared to the United States. It is particularly high and growing rapidly among the largest firms, a trend observed across all countries and regions. The rise of common ownership stems not only from increased institutional investment but also from its growing concentration, a development in which the Big Three (BlackRock, Vanguard, State Street) play a dominant role, particularly in the United States. Although non-Big Three institutional investors remain important in other countries, the significant increase in common ownership in many countries is primarily attributable to the breadth, size, and growth of Big Three holdings. We also investigate how common ownership is related to legal, institutional, and market characteristics such as investor protection laws, competition laws, mandatory ESG disclosure, and labor market frictions across firms and countries.
33965.zh_abstract: 我们研究了2005年至2019年49个国家的共同所有权，发现它在全球范围内普遍存在且不断上升。然而，尽管存在这种全球增长，所有国家的共同所有权水平仍远低于美国。在最大的公司中，共同所有权尤其高且增长迅速，这一趋势在所有国家和地区都能观察到。共同所有权的上升不仅源于机构投资的增加，还源于其日益集中，其中三大资产管理公司（贝莱德、先锋领航、道富）发挥着主导作用，尤其是在美国。尽管非三大机构投资者在其他国家仍然重要，但许多国家共同所有权的显著增长主要归因于三大资产管理公司持股的广度、规模和增长。我们还研究了共同所有权如何与法律、制度和市场特征（如投资者保护法、竞争法、强制性环境、社会和治理披露以及跨公司和国家的劳动力市场摩擦）相关联。
33965.meta: Programs：CF, IO, LE；JEL：F65, G32, K21, L40

33964.title: Foreign Political Risk and Technological Change
33964.zh_title: 外国政治风险与技术变革
33964.authors: Joel P. Flynn, Antoine B. Levy, Jacob Moscona, Mai Wo
33964.abstract: This paper studies how innovation reacts to foreign political risk and shapes its economic consequences. In a model with foreign political shocks that can disrupt foreign supply, we show that greater political risk abroad increases domestic innovation, thereby lowering reliance on risky sourcing countries. We then combine data on sector-level technology development with time-varying measures of industry-level exposure to foreign political risk and report three sets of empirical findings. First, sectors and commodities with higher exposure to foreign political risk exhibit significantly greater innovative activity. This finding holds across sectors in the US, across country-sector pairs in a global sample, and across critical minerals. Second, the response of innovation is particularly strong when risk emanates from geopolitical adversaries. This is consistent with our finding that trade restrictions are more likely to emerge between non-allies following a rise in political risk in either country. Third, directed innovation reduces countries’ reliance on imports from risky foreign markets. In doing so, technological change abroad amplifies the negative effects of domestic political risk on export performance.
33964.zh_abstract: 本文研究创新如何应对外国政治风险并塑造其经济后果。在一个可能扰乱外国供应的外国政治冲击模型中，我们表明，国外政治风险的增加会促进国内创新，从而降低对高风险来源国的依赖。接着，我们将部门层面的技术发展数据与行业层面对外国政治风险暴露的时变指标相结合，报告了三组实证发现。第一，对外国政治风险暴露程度更高的部门和商品表现出显著更强的创新活动。这一发现在美国各部门、全球样本中的国家-部门配对以及关键矿产中均成立。第二，当风险来自地缘政治对手时，创新的反应尤为强烈。这与我们的发现一致，即当任一国家的政治风险上升时，非盟友国家之间更可能出现贸易限制。第三，定向创新降低了各国对高风险外国市场的进口依赖。通过这种方式，外国的技术变革放大了国内政治风险对出口绩效的负面影响。

33963.title: A Stairway to Success: How Parenting Shapes Culture and Social Stratification
33963.zh_title: 通往成功的阶梯：养育方式如何塑造文化与社会分层
33963.authors: Francesco Agostinelli, Matthias Doepke, Giuseppe Sorrenti, Fabrizio Zilibotti
33963.abstract: This chapter argues that parenting choices are a central force in the joint evolution of culture and economic outcomes. We present a framework in which parents-motivated by both their children’s future success and their own normative beliefs-choose parenting styles and transmit cultural traits responding to economic incentives. Values such as work ethic, patience, and religiosity are more likely to be instilled when their anticipated returns, economic or otherwise, are high. The interaction between parenting and economic conditions gives rise to endogenous cultural and economic stratification. We extend the model to include residential sorting and social interactions, showing how neighborhood choice reinforces disparities in trust and human capital. Empirical evidence from the World Values Survey supports the model’s key predictions. We conclude by highlighting open questions at the intersection of parenting, culture, and inequality.
33963.zh_abstract: 本章认为，养育方式的选择是文化与经济结果共同演化的核心力量。我们提出了一个框架，其中父母——既受子女未来成功的驱动，也受自身规范性信念的影响——选择养育方式并传递文化特质，以回应经济激励。诸如职业道德、耐心和宗教信仰等价值观，在其预期回报（无论是经济回报还是其他回报）较高时更可能被灌输。养育方式与经济条件之间的相互作用导致了内生的文化和经济分层。我们将模型扩展到包括居住分选和社会互动，展示了邻里选择如何加剧信任和人力资本方面的差距。来自世界价值观调查的实证证据支持了模型的关键预测。最后，我们强调了养育方式、文化和不平等交叉领域中的未解问题。

33962.title: Uncertainty in Empirical Economics
33962.zh_title: 实证经济学中的不确定性
33962.abstract: Econometricians invest substantial effort in constructing standard errors that yield valid inference under a hypothetical data-generating process. This paper asks a fundamental question: Are the uncertainty statements reported by applied researchers consistent with empirical frequencies? The short answer is no. Drawing on the forecasting literature, we predict estimates from “new” studies using estimates from corresponding baseline studies. By doing this across a large number of study groups and linking parameters through a hierarchical model, we compare stated probabilities to observed empirical frequencies. Alignment occurs only under limited external validity, namely, that the studies estimate different parameters.
33962.zh_abstract: 计量经济学家投入大量精力构建标准误，以便在假设的数据生成过程中得出有效的推断。本文提出了一个基本问题：应用研究者报告的不确定性陈述是否与经验频率一致？简短的回答是：不一致。借鉴预测文献，我们使用相应基线研究的估计值来预测“新”研究的估计值。通过跨大量研究组进行此操作，并利用分层模型连接参数，我们将陈述的概率与观察到的经验频率进行比较。只有在有限的外部有效性条件下，即这些研究估计的是不同参数时，两者才会一致。
33962.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, LS, ME；JEL：C11, C18, C21

33961.title: Immigration and Inequality in the Next Generation
33961.zh_title: 移民与下一代的不平等
33961.authors: Mark Borgschulte, Heepyung Cho, Darren Lubotsky, Jonathan L. Rothbaum
33961.abstract: We estimate the causal impacts of immigration to U.S. cities on the intergenerational economic mobility of children of U.S.-born parents. Immigration raises the educational attainment and earnings among individuals who grew up in poorer households and reduces the earnings, educational attainment, and employment among those who grew up in more affluent households. On net, immigration diminishes the link between parents' and their children's economic outcomes in the receiving population, and thus increases intergenerational mobility. The increase in mobility is strikingly similar in models estimated across cities and in within-city models that control for the trajectories of immigrant destinations.
33961.zh_abstract: 我们估计了移民到美国城市对本土出生父母子女的代际经济流动性的因果影响。移民提高了在较贫困家庭中长大的个体的教育程度和收入，但降低了在较富裕家庭中长大的个体的收入、教育程度和就业率。总体而言，移民削弱了接收人口中父母与其子女经济结果之间的联系，从而增加了代际流动性。这种流动性的增加在跨城市估计的模型以及控制移民目的地轨迹的城市内模型中惊人地相似。

33960.title: Borrowing Constraints, Markups, and Misallocation
33960.zh_title: 借贷约束、加成率与资源错配
33960.authors: Huiyu Li, Chen Lian, Yueran Ma, Emily Martell
33960.abstract: We document that less constrained firms in an industry have higher markups. This connection between markups and borrowing constraints has important allocative efficiency implications: it lowers the TFP losses from markup dispersion, because looser borrowing constraints help higher markup firms produce more and move their market shares closer to the efficient level. We further document that this relationship is stronger in industries where firms rely more on earnings to borrow, and that markup dispersion is also higher in these industries. We explain all of these patterns using a standard Kimball demand model augmented with borrowing against assets and earnings, and show that the connection between markups and borrowing constraints substantially lowers TFP losses from markup dispersion, especially when firms rely on earnings to borrow.
33960.zh_abstract: 我们记录到，行业中受约束较少的公司具有更高的加成率。加成率与借贷约束之间的这种联系具有重要的配置效率含义：它降低了由加成率分散造成的全要素生产率损失，因为更宽松的借贷约束有助于高加成率公司增加产出，并将其市场份额推向更接近有效水平。我们进一步记录到，这种关系在更依赖收益进行借贷的行业中更强，并且这些行业的加成率分散程度也更高。我们使用一个标准的Kimball需求模型（并增加了基于资产和收益的借贷）来解释所有这些模式，并表明加成率与借贷约束之间的联系显著降低了由加成率分散造成的全要素生产率损失，尤其是在公司依赖收益进行借贷时。

33959.title: Net Worth Poverty in Childhood: How Duration and Timing Affect Educational Outcomes
33959.zh_title: 童年期的净资产贫困：持续时间和时机如何影响教育结果
33959.authors: Christina M. Gibson-Davis, Lisa A. Keister, Lisa A. Gennetian, Shuyi Qiu
33959.abstract: Very low household wealth, or net worth poverty (NWP), is the modal form of poverty for American children, yet little is understood about how it is experienced across childhood or its associations with children’s human capital accumulation. Using data from the 1999-2021 waves of the Panel Study of Income Dynamics on a cohort of children followed from birth to age 20, this study examines the influence of NWP exposure and duration across a child’s life course on high school graduation and college attendance. Findings show that through age 18, children experienced more frequent and enduring spells of net worth poverty than income poverty. NWP was negatively associated with high school graduation and college attendance independent of the effects of income poverty. Effects were more pronounced for college attendance than for high school graduation, perhaps reflecting the resource-intensive nature of college. The negative effects of NWP were most pronounced for the 31% of the sample that was NWP for at least four waves. The timing of NWP relative to developmental stage did not seem to matter, as children were at risk regardless of the age at which they experienced net worth poverty.
33959.zh_abstract: 极低的家庭财富，即净资产贫困，是美国儿童贫困的主要形式，然而关于儿童期如何经历净资产贫困及其与儿童人力资本积累的关联，人们知之甚少。本研究使用1999-2021年收入动态面板研究中一个从出生追踪至20岁的儿童队列数据，考察了儿童生命历程中净资产贫困的暴露和持续时间对高中毕业和大学入学的影响。结果显示，到18岁时，儿童经历净资产贫困的频率和持续时间均高于收入贫困。净资产贫困与高中毕业和大学入学呈负相关，且独立于收入贫困的影响。对大学入学的影响比对高中毕业的影响更为显著，这可能反映了大学对资源的高需求。对于样本中至少四个时期处于净资产贫困的31%的儿童，净资产贫困的负面影响最为显著。净资产贫困相对于发展阶段的时间似乎并不重要，因为无论儿童在哪个年龄经历净资产贫困，他们都面临风险。

33958.title: Building Costs and House Prices
33958.abstract: We take a long, broad, and theoretically agnostic view toward the connection between building costs and house prices in the US housing market. We find that building costs have never had all that much explanatory power over US housing prices, but even the imperfect correlations of the past have weakened further in recent decades along multiple dimensions.
33958.zh_abstract: 我们对美国住房市场中建筑成本与房价之间的联系采取了一种长期、广泛且理论上不可知论的视角。我们发现，建筑成本对美国房价的解释力从来都不强，但即使是过去不完美的相关性，在近几十年来也在多个维度上进一步减弱了。

33957.title: Blockbusters, Sequels and the Nature of Innovation
33957.zh_title: 重磅产品、续集与创新的本质
33957.authors: Wesley M. Cohen, Matthew J. Higgins, William D. Miles, Yoko Shibuya
33957.abstract: Using detailed product- and invention-level data from the pharmaceutical industry, we demonstrate that firms with particularly high-selling “blockbuster” products concentrate their development efforts on new products that both target the same customer segments and are more likely to be technically similar to existing blockbuster products. This behavior, driven by an expectation of the stickiness of demand for existing product offerings, limits firms' incentives to invest in entirely new products targeting different customer segments. Our findings offer insights into how blockbuster products shape firms' customer segment and innovation choices, with implications for understanding the dynamics of technological change in R&D-intensive industries.
33957.zh_abstract: 利用制药行业详细的产品和发明层面数据，我们证明，拥有特别畅销的“重磅”产品的公司将其开发工作集中在既针对相同客户群体、又更可能在技术上与现有重磅产品相似的新产品上。这种行为是由对现有产品需求粘性的预期所驱动的，限制了公司投资于针对不同客户群体的全新产品的激励。我们的发现揭示了重磅产品如何塑造公司的客户群体和创新选择，对理解研发密集型行业中技术变革的动态具有启示意义。

33956.title: The Net Benefits of Raising Bachelor’s Degree Completion through the City University of New York ACE Program
33956.zh_title: 通过纽约市立大学ACE项目提高学士学位完成率的净收益
33956.authors: Judith Scott-Clayton, Irwin Garfinkel, Elizabeth Ananat, Sophie M. Collyer, Robert Paul Hartley, Anastasia Koutavas, Buyi Wang, Christopher Wimer
33956.abstract: In 2015, the City University of New York (CUNY) launched a new program— Accelerate, Complete, and Engage (ACE)—aimed at improving college graduation rates. A prior randomized-control evaluation of the program found a nearly 12 percentage point increase in graduation five years after college entry. Using this impact estimate and national data on earnings by gender, age, and degree status; we estimate incremental expected long-run benefits and costs for participants, as well as intergenerational effects for the children of participants, relative to “business as usual” for the control group. Our main estimate indicates net social benefits of more than $\$48,000$ over a lifetime per participant from greater earnings and labor force attachment, improvements in health, and savings in public transfers. A major contribution of our analysis is the estimation of second-generational benefits. Including intergenerational benefits for children who grow up in newly higher-earning families nearly triples this estimate, to over $\$130,000$ in net social benefits per participant. These results are sensitive to assumptions about whether the impact on graduation after five years persists indefinitely, or whether the control group eventually catches up. Still, net social benefits are strongly positive even under our most conservative assumptions.
33956.zh_abstract: 2015年，纽约市立大学（CUNY）启动了一项名为“加速、完成与参与”（ACE）的新项目，旨在提高大学毕业率。此前对该项目的一项随机对照评估发现，大学入学五年后的毕业率提高了近12个百分点。利用这一影响估计值以及按性别、年龄和学位状况划分的全国收入数据，我们估算了参与者相对于对照组“常规情况”的增量预期长期收益和成本，以及参与者子女的代际效应。我们的主要估计表明，由于更高的收入和劳动力市场参与度、健康状况的改善以及公共转移支付的节省，每位参与者一生中可获得超过48,000美元的净社会收益。我们分析的一个主要贡献是对第二代收益的估计。将成长于新近更高收入家庭的儿童的代际收益纳入考虑后，这一估计值几乎增加了两倍，达到每位参与者超过130,000美元的净社会收益。这些结果对以下假设很敏感：五年后对毕业率的影响是否会无限期持续，或者对照组最终是否会赶上。尽管如此，即使在我们最保守的假设下，净社会收益也仍然强烈为正。

33955.title: Maturity Risks and Bank Runs
33955.abstract: Inspired by the Silicon Valley Bank run and building on Diamond- Dybvig (1993), we develop a model in which asset price fluctuations can trigger bank runs. Liquidation amounts to selling assets at their market price. Depositors can buy and hold the assets after paying an idiosyncratic cost. We characterize the equilibria. We introduce a withdrawal pressure function to distinguish between fundamental runs, driven by market price declines, and self-enforcing runs triggered by depositor panic. Deposit insurance can prevent self-enforcing runs but incurs losses during fundamental runs. Regulatory measures ensuring price resilience reduce run risks, but at the expense of depositor welfare.
33955.zh_abstract: 受硅谷银行挤兑事件的启发，并在Diamond-Dybvig（1993）模型的基础上，我们构建了一个模型，其中资产价格波动可能引发银行挤兑。清算相当于按市场价格出售资产。存款人在支付异质性成本后可以购买并持有这些资产。我们对均衡进行了刻画。我们引入了一个提款压力函数，以区分由市场价格下跌驱动的根本性挤兑和由存款人恐慌引发的自我强化挤兑。存款保险可以防止自我强化挤兑，但在根本性挤兑期间会产生损失。确保价格韧性的监管措施降低了挤兑风险，但以牺牲存款人福利为代价。
33955.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E43, E44, G01, G21, G28

33954.title: Do Physicians Follow the Golden Rule? Evidence of Imperfect Agency and Moral Hazard from Physicians’ Self-Prescriptions
33954.zh_title: 医生遵循黄金法则吗？来自医生自我处方的非完全代理与道德风险证据
33954.abstract: Using data on prescriptions for cholesterol-lowering drugs (statins), we study differences in the treatments chosen by Danish physicians for themselves versus for their patients. We estimate that physicians discount patient health benefit relative to their own, valuing the additional potency of a stronger statin by significantly more if it is for their own use. We exploit variation in expected coinsurance to estimate that moral hazard accounts for a modest share, no more than 15%, of this additional valuation. Statin-using physicians also respond more quickly to a patent expiration, suggesting greater effort to stay informed on drug classes they personally use.
33954.zh_abstract: 利用降胆固醇药物（他汀类药物）的处方数据，我们研究了丹麦医生为自己和患者选择治疗方案时的差异。我们估计，医生对患者健康收益的重视程度低于对自身健康收益的重视程度，如果药物是给自己使用，他们对更强效他汀类药物额外效力的估值会显著更高。我们利用预期共付率的差异来估计，道德风险仅占这种额外估值的较小部分，不超过15%。使用他汀类药物的医生对专利到期反应也更快，这表明他们在个人使用的药物类别上付出了更多努力以保持信息更新。

33953.title: Uncertainty through the Production Network: Sectoral Origins and Macroeconomic Implications
33953.zh_title: 通过生产网络传导的不确定性：行业起源与宏观经济影响
33953.abstract: We study how uncertainty propagates through production networks. First, we construct a highly disaggregated, forward-looking measure of industry-level uncertainty using option-implied volatility data for U.S. firms. Second, we identify the effects of higher uncertainty within industries, across the supply chain, and at the aggregate level. We find that heightened uncertainty in upstream industries (e.g., chemical manufacturing, iron and steel mills) behaves like a negative supply shock—raising prices and lowering employment across the production network. In contrast, greater uncertainty in downstream industries (e.g., automotive manufacturing, insurance carriers) behaves like an adverse demand shock, reducing both prices and employment. At the aggregate level, the inflation response depends on where uncertainty originates within the supply chain. A multi-sector model with time-varying sectoral uncertainty demonstrates that production linkages play a central role in explaining these empirical findings.
33953.zh_abstract: 我们研究了不确定性如何通过生产网络传导。首先，我们利用美国企业的期权隐含波动率数据，构建了一个高度细化的、前瞻性的行业层面不确定性指标。其次，我们识别了行业内、供应链上下游以及总体层面不确定性上升的影响。我们发现，上游行业（例如化学制造业、钢铁厂）不确定性上升表现为负向供给冲击——在整个生产网络中推高价格并降低就业。相比之下，下游行业（例如汽车制造业、保险公司）不确定性上升表现为负向需求冲击，同时降低价格和就业。在总体层面，通胀反应取决于不确定性在供应链中的起源。一个包含时变行业不确定性的多部门模型表明，生产关联在解释这些实证发现中起着核心作用。

33952.title: FCI-star
33952.authors: Ricardo J. Caballero, Tomás E. Caravello, Alp Simsek
33952.abstract: Central banks rely on r∗—the neutral interest rate—to assess policy stance. However, monetary policy affects activity through broad financial conditions, not only the short-term rate. We propose FCI∗, the neutral level of a financial conditions index consistent with output at potential. Unlike r∗, FCI∗ is insulated from financial fluctuations: when asset prices move, FCI captures their estimated effect on output, leaving FCI∗ to reflect only what the macroeconomy requires. In U.S. data, r∗ co-moves with the equity premium; FCI∗ does not. FCI gaps provide useful real-time guidance on policy stance, especially when financial conditions diverge from the policy rate.
33952.zh_abstract: 中央银行依赖r*（中性利率）来评估政策立场。然而，货币政策通过广泛的金融状况（而不仅仅是短期利率）影响经济活动。我们提出了FCI*，即与潜在产出相一致的金融状况指数的中性水平。与r*不同，FCI*不受金融波动的干扰：当资产价格变动时，FCI捕捉其对产出的估计影响，而FCI*仅反映宏观经济所需。在美国数据中，r*与股权溢价共同变动；FCI*则不然。FCI缺口为政策立场提供了有用的实时指导，尤其是在金融状况与政策利率出现背离时。
33952.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：C32, E43, E44, E52, E58

33951.title: Tapping Business and Household Surveys to Sharpen Our View of Work from Home
33951.zh_title: 利用企业与家庭调查来深化我们对居家办公的认识
33951.authors: Jose Maria Barrero, Nicholas Bloom, Kathryn Bonney, Cory L. Breaux, Cathy Buffington, Steven J. Davis, Lucia S. Foster, Brian McKenzie, Keith Savage, Cristina Tello-Trillo
33951.abstract: The Business Trends and Outlook Survey collected detailed data on work from home (WFH) practices at more than 150,000 American firms from November 2024 to January 2025. These data fill a key gap by providing timely business-level measures of WFH for the U.S. economy and complementing parallel data collection efforts in household-level surveys. We document four main results. First, employees WFH one day per week on average across firms, ranging from 2.8 days per week in the Information sector to 0.1 days in the Accommodation and Food Services sector. Second, looking five years ahead, businesses expect WFH rates at their own organizations to remain at one day per week, on average. Third, the most common view of businesses is that productivity is similar for WFH and onsite work. Seven percent of firms say onsite work is more productive, while two percent say WFH is more productive. Fourth, 70 percent of firms do not monitor whether their employees meet onsite work requirements, and 75 percent do not track how much their employees WFH. These results confirm that WFH is an enduring feature of the U.S. economic landscape, with massive variation in its extent across employees, businesses, and sectors. These lessons also serve as a starting point for enhancing WFH-related content in the American Community Survey and other household surveys.
33951.zh_abstract: 商业趋势与展望调查收集了2024年11月至2025年1月期间超过15万家美国企业关于居家办公（WFH）实践的详细数据。这些数据填补了一个关键空白，为美国经济提供了及时的企业层面WFH衡量指标，并补充了家庭层面调查的并行数据收集工作。我们记录了四个主要结果。首先，各企业员工平均每周居家办公一天，范围从信息行业的每周2.8天到住宿和餐饮服务行业的0.1天。其次，展望未来五年，企业预计其自身组织的WFH比率平均仍将维持在每周一天。第三，企业最普遍的观点是WFH和现场办公的生产率相似。7%的企业认为现场办公生产率更高，而2%的企业认为WFH生产率更高。第四，70%的企业不监控员工是否满足现场办公要求，75%的企业不追踪员工居家办公的时间。这些结果证实，WFH是美国经济格局的一个持久特征，其在员工、企业和行业之间的普及程度存在巨大差异。这些经验教训也可作为增强美国社区调查及其他家庭调查中WFH相关内容的起点。

33950.title: Life Satisfaction in Western Europe and the Gradual Vanishing of the U-shape in Age
33950.zh_title: 西欧的生活满意度与年龄U型曲线的逐渐消失
33950.abstract: Using Eurobarometer data for 21 Western European countries since 1973 we show the U-shape in life satisfaction by age, present for so long, has now vanished. In 13 northern European countries - Belgium, Denmark, Finland, Germany, Iceland, Ireland, Luxembourg, the Netherlands, Norway, Sweden, Switzerland, Turkey and the UK - the U-shape has been replaced by life satisfaction rising in age. We confirm these findings with evidence from the European Social Surveys, the Global Flourishing Survey and Global Minds. Evidence of change in the U-shape is mixed for Austria and France. In six southern European countries – Cyprus, Greece, Italy, Malta, Spain and Portugal - the U-shape was replaced by life satisfaction declining in age. In these southern European countries, life satisfaction of the young has been rising since around 2015. A contributory factor is the rapid decline in youth unemployment from its 2015 peak.
33950.zh_abstract: 利用自1973年以来21个西欧国家的欧洲晴雨表数据，我们表明长期存在的按年龄划分的生活满意度U型曲线现已消失。在13个北欧国家——比利时、丹麦、芬兰、德国、冰岛、爱尔兰、卢森堡、荷兰、挪威、瑞典、瑞士、土耳其和英国——U型曲线已被生活满意度随年龄上升所取代。我们通过欧洲社会调查、全球繁荣调查和全球心智调查的证据证实了这些发现。奥地利和法国的U型曲线变化证据不一。在六个南欧国家——塞浦路斯、希腊、意大利、马耳他、西班牙和葡萄牙——U型曲线已被生活满意度随年龄下降所取代。在这些南欧国家，年轻人的生活满意度自2015年左右以来一直在上升。一个促成因素是青年失业率从2015年的峰值迅速下降。

33949.title: Designing Human-AI Collaboration: A Sufficient-Statistic Approach
33949.zh_title: 设计人机协作：一个充分统计量方法
33949.authors: Nikhil Agarwal, Alex Moehring, Alexander Wolitzky
33949.abstract: We propose a sufficient statistic for designing AI information-disclosure and selective automation policies. The approach allows for endogenous and biased beliefs, and effort crowd-out, without using a structural model of human decision-making. We deploy and validate our approach in a fact-checking experiment. Humans under-respond to AI predictions and reduce effort when presented with confident AI predictions. Overconfidence in own-signal rather than under-confidence in AI drives AI under-response. The optimal policy automates decisions where the AI is confident and delegates the other decisions while fully disclosing the AI prediction. Although automation is valuable, the benefit of assisting humans with AI is negligible.
33949.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个用于设计人工智能信息披露和选择性自动化政策的充分统计量。该方法允许存在内生性和有偏信念以及努力挤出效应，而无需使用人类决策的结构模型。我们在一个事实核查实验中部署并验证了我们的方法。人类对人工智能预测的反应不足，并且在面对高置信度的人工智能预测时会减少努力。对自己信号的过度自信而非对人工智能的缺乏信心是导致对人工智能反应不足的原因。最优政策是在人工智能有信心的决策上实现自动化，并将其他决策委托给人类，同时完全披露人工智能的预测。尽管自动化是有价值的，但用人工智能辅助人类的收益微乎其微。

33948.title: A Matter of Time? Measuring Effects of Public Schooling Expansions on Families
33948.zh_title: 时间问题？衡量公立教育扩张对家庭的影响
33948.authors: Chloe Gibbs, Jocelyn S. Wikle, Riley Wilson
33948.abstract: We leverage pronounced changes in the availability of public schooling for young children—through duration expansions to the kindergarten day—to better understand how an implicit childcare subsidy affects mothers and families. Exploiting full-day kindergarten variation across place and time from 1992 through 2022 and novel data on state-level policy changes, combined with a comparison of children of typical kindergarten age to older children, we measure effects on parental labor supply and family childcare expenses. Results suggest that families are responsive to these shifts. Full-day kindergarten expansions were responsible for as much as 24 percent of the growth in employment of mothers with kindergarten-aged children in this time frame.
33948.zh_abstract: 我们利用幼儿公立教育可及性的显著变化——通过延长幼儿园学日至全天——来更好地理解隐性儿童保育补贴如何影响母亲和家庭。利用1992年至2022年间全天制幼儿园在地区和时期上的差异，以及关于州级政策变化的新数据，并结合对典型幼儿园年龄儿童与年长儿童的比较，我们衡量了这些变化对父母劳动供给和家庭儿童保育支出的影响。结果表明，家庭对这些变化反应灵敏。全天制幼儿园的扩张，在这一时期内，对幼儿园年龄儿童母亲就业增长的贡献高达24%。

33947.title: Culture, Policy, and Economic Development
33947.authors: Natalie Bau, Sara Lowes, Eduardo Montero
33947.abstract: Culture shapes how policies are made and how people react to them. This chapter explores how culture and development policy affect each other. First, we provide evidence that cultural mismatch — specifically a mismatch between project manager background and the location of project implementation — is associated with the reduced success of World Bank projects. Second, drawing on historical and ethnographic work, we show that disregarding local cultural norms can undermine well-intentioned development policies. Third, we review economic research demonstrating that cultural practices systematically shape policy effectiveness, often leading to heterogeneous or unintended effects. Fourth, we discuss evidence that policies themselves can reshape cultural norms, sometimes in unexpected ways. Finally, we discuss research on tailoring interventions to the local context and conclude with lessons for future research.
33947.zh_abstract: 文化塑造了政策的制定方式以及人们对政策的反应。本章探讨文化与发展政策如何相互影响。首先，我们提供证据表明，文化错配——特别是项目经理背景与项目实施地点之间的错配——与世界银行项目成功率降低相关。其次，借鉴历史和人种学研究成果，我们表明忽视当地文化规范可能会破坏本意良好的发展政策。第三，我们回顾了经济学研究，这些研究表明文化实践系统地塑造了政策有效性，常常导致异质性或非预期效应。第四，我们讨论了政策本身可以重塑文化规范的证据，有时是以意想不到的方式。最后，我们探讨了针对当地环境定制干预措施的研究，并总结了未来研究的经验教训。

33946.title: Quantifying Racial Disparities Using Consecutive Employment Spells
33946.zh_title: 利用连续就业经历量化种族差异
33946.abstract: This paper develops a framework to quantify racial disparities in earnings and employment that are not plausibly due to differences in productivity. Over an employment cycle, employers learn about worker productivity and workers move to more productive and less prejudiced employers. I use implications of this behavior to match high-tenure Black and white workers on unobservables. I look at matched pairs who lose their jobs in a mass layoff. Gaps in earnings and separations between these workers in their next jobs are not plausibly due to differences in productivity. Using U.S. data, earnings differences between these matched workers are five log points, about a quarter of the racial earnings gap among high-tenure workers. Similarly, matched Black workers are more likely to separate.
33946.zh_abstract: 本文构建了一个框架，用于量化在收入与就业方面不太可能归因于生产力差异的种族差异。在一个就业周期中，雇主了解工人的生产力，工人则流向生产力更高、偏见更少的雇主。我利用这一行为的含义，将高任期黑人和白人工人在不可观测特征上进行匹配。我关注在大规模裁员中失去工作的匹配对。这些工人在下一份工作中的收入差距和离职率不太可能归因于生产力差异。利用美国数据，这些匹配工人之间的收入差异为五个对数点，约占高任期工人种族收入差距的四分之一。同样，匹配的黑人工人更有可能离职。

33945.title: Small Business Innovation Applied to National Needs
33945.zh_title: 面向国家需求的小企业创新
33945.authors: Kyle R. Myers, Lauren Lanahan, Evan Johnson
33945.abstract: Small businesses have long supplied a disproportionate share of major innovations in the United States. We review a centerpiece policy on this topic: the US Small Business Innovation Research (SBIR) program. We trace its legislative history and summarize program evaluations over the past four decades. Using newly matched data on SBIR awards and venture capital investments into small businesses, we show that, despite often being compared to venture-backed businesses, SBIR-backed businesses pursue very different strategies. We use simple economic theories to motivate the SBIR program as a vehicle for the government to invest in small-scale, well-defined, but risky technologies that have large externalities, and we highlight a number of case studies consistent with this framework. Because the motivating friction lies at the level of ideas, our perspective encourages future evaluations to determine how the SBIR program influences not just who does the inventing, but what gets invented. Looking forward we discuss how rising industrial concentration and the diffusion of artificial intelligence may reshape the program’s comparative advantage in the innovation policy toolkit.
33945.zh_abstract: 长期以来，小企业在美国重大创新中占据了不成比例的份额。我们回顾了这方面的核心政策：美国小企业创新研究（SBIR）计划。我们追溯了其立法历史，并总结了过去四十年的项目评估。利用新匹配的SBIR奖励数据和小企业风险投资数据，我们表明，尽管经常与风险投资支持的企业相比较，但SBIR支持的企业追求的是截然不同的战略。我们使用简单的经济理论来论证SBIR计划是政府投资于小规模、定义明确但风险较高、具有巨大外部性技术的工具，并强调了与此框架一致的若干案例研究。由于激励摩擦存在于创意层面，我们的视角鼓励未来的评估确定SBIR计划如何不仅影响谁在进行发明，而且影响发明了什么。展望未来，我们讨论了工业集中度的上升和人工智能的扩散可能如何重塑该计划在创新政策工具箱中的比较优势。

33944.title: Measuring the Production of Scientific Human Capital: New Data, Methods, and Evidence on the U.S. Scientific Training Ecosystem
33944.zh_title: 资助美国科学培训生态系统：新数据、方法与证据
33944.authors: Dror Shvadron, Hansen Zhang, Lee Fleming, Daniel P. Gross
33944.abstract: Using newly-collected data on the near-population of U.S. STEM PhD graduates since 1950, we examine who funds PhD training, how many graduates are trained in areas of strategic national importance, and the effects of public investment in PhD training on the scientific workforce. The U.S. federal government is by far the largest source of financial and in-kind support for STEM PhD training in America. We identify universities and fields where PhD training has a higher or lower intensity of government, industry, or philanthropic support, and the organizations and universities that fund and train the most PhDs in critical technology areas such as AI, quantum information technology, and biotechnology. Leveraging variation in government support across agencies and over time, we provide evidence suggesting that increasing government-funded PhD trainees increases PhD production roughly one-for-one. To support further research, we provide public datasets at multiple levels of aggregation, reporting PhD graduates by (i) critical technology area and (ii) source of support.
33944.zh_abstract: 利用新收集的、涵盖自1950年以来美国STEM博士毕业生近乎总体的数据，我们考察了谁资助博士培训、有多少毕业生在具有国家战略重要性的领域接受培训，以及公共投资于博士培训对科学劳动力的影响。美国联邦政府是美国STEM博士培训最大的资金和实物支持来源。我们识别出博士培训中政府、行业或慈善支持强度较高或较低的大学和领域，以及在人工智能、量子信息技术和生物技术等关键技术领域资助和培训最多博士的组织和大学。利用不同机构间以及随时间变化的政府支持差异，我们提供的证据表明，增加政府资助的博士培训生大致会一对一地增加博士产出。为支持进一步研究，我们提供了多个聚合层次的公共数据集，报告了按（i）关键技术领域和（ii）支持来源分类的博士毕业生。
33944.meta: Programs：ED, PE, PR；JEL：I23, I28, O31, O32, O33, O38

33943.title: Financing the Next VC-Backed Startup: The Role of Gender
33943.zh_title: 为下一家风险投资支持的初创企业融资：性别的作用
33943.authors: Camille Hebert, Emmanuel Yimfor, Heather Tookes
33943.abstract: What is the role of gender in the serial founding of VC-backed startups? Despite robust evidence linking serial entrepreneurship to startup success, women comprise 13.3% of VC-backed founders but only 4% of those founding three or more startups. Using a novel design comparing men and women cofounders of the same startup, we estimate substantial gender gaps in subsequent funding outcomes on average and following failure or success of the current startup. We find these at both the extensive and intensive margins. For example, following failure, women are 22.5% less likely to found another VC-backed startup compared to their cofounders who are men. Among those who do found another VC-backed firm, women raise 53.3% less capital following failure of the current venture and 24.6% less capital following success. These gaps contribute to the well-documented gender gap in VC funding. Lower interest of women in founding new firms can only partially explain our findings. We find no evidence of gender differences in founder quality or of statistical updating by investors. Instead, consistent with unequal treatment of women, we find that women serial founders are penalized with smaller VC deals following failures of their prior startups but they are not rewarded with larger deal sizes following past successes. By contrast, men are rewarded for their prior experiences as founders, regardless of whether their startups were failures or successes. In line with theories of stereotyping and confirmation bias, we also find striking negative spillovers from unrelated women-founded failures within investors’ portfolios (and no positive spillovers from their successes).
33943.zh_abstract: 在风险投资支持的初创企业的连续创业中，性别扮演什么角色？尽管有确凿证据表明连续创业与初创企业成功相关，但女性仅占风险投资支持创始人的13.3%，而在创立三家或更多初创企业的创始人中仅占4%。利用一种新颖的设计，比较同一家初创企业的男性和女性联合创始人，我们估计出在后续融资结果上存在显著的性别差距，无论是在当前初创企业失败还是成功之后，平均而言也是如此。我们在广延边际和集约边际上都发现了这些差距。例如，在失败之后，女性创立另一家风险投资支持初创企业的可能性比其男性联合创始人低22.5%。在那些确实创立了另一家风险投资支持企业的女性中，在当前企业失败后，她们筹集的资本少53.3%；在成功之后，则少24.6%。这些差距导致了有充分文献记载的风险投资融资中的性别差距。女性对创立新企业的较低兴趣只能部分解释我们的发现。我们没有发现创始人质量存在性别差异或投资者进行统计更新的证据。相反，与对女性的不平等待遇一致，我们发现女性连续创业者在先前初创企业失败后会因较小的风险投资交易而受到惩罚，但在过去成功之后并未获得更大的交易规模奖励。相比之下，男性会因其作为创始人的先前经验而获得奖励，无论其初创企业是失败还是成功。与刻板印象和确认偏误理论一致，我们还发现投资者投资组合中不相关的女性创办企业失败存在显著的负面溢出效应（而其成功则没有正面溢出效应）。

33942.title: Private Equity and Workers: Modeling and Measuring Monopsony, Implicit Contracts, and Efficient Reallocation
33942.zh_title: 私募股权与工人：对买方垄断、隐性合同与有效重新配置的建模与衡量
33942.authors: Kyle F. Herkenhoff, Josh Lerner, Gordon M. Phillips, Francisca Rebelo, Benjamin Sampson
33942.abstract: We measure the real effects of private equity buyouts on worker outcomes by building a new database that links transactions to matched employer-employee data in the United States. To guide our empirical analysis, we derive testable implications from three theories in which private equity managers alter worker outcomes: (1) exertion of monopsony power in concentrated markets, (2) breach of implicit contracts with targeted groups of workers, including managers and top earners, and (3) efficient reallocation of workers across plants. We do not find any evidence that private equity-backed firms vary wages and employment based on local labor market power proxies. Wage losses are also very similar for managers and top earners. Instead, we find strong evidence that private equity managers downsize less productive plants relative to productive plants while simultaneously reallocating high-wage workers to more productive plants. We conclude that post-buyout employment and wage dynamics are consistent with professional investors providing incentives to increase productivity and monitor the companies in which they invest.
33942.zh_abstract: 我们通过构建一个将交易与美国匹配的雇主-雇员数据联系起来的新数据库，来衡量私募股权收购对工人结果的真实影响。为指导我们的实证分析，我们从三种理论中推导出可检验的含义，这些理论中私募股权管理者改变了工人结果：（1）在集中市场中行使买方垄断力量，（2）违反与目标工人群体（包括管理者和高收入者）的隐性合同，以及（3）跨工厂的工人有效重新配置。我们没有发现任何证据表明私募股权支持的企业根据当地劳动力市场力量代理指标来调整工资和就业。管理者和高收入者的工资损失也非常相似。相反，我们发现了强有力的证据，表明私募股权管理者相对于高生产率工厂缩减了低生产率工厂的规模，同时将高工资工人重新配置到高生产率工厂。我们得出结论，收购后的就业和工资动态与专业投资者提供激励以提高生产率并监督其投资公司的行为是一致的。

33998.title: AI and the Fed
33998.abstract: This paper examines how central banks can strategically integrate artificial intelligence (AI) to enhance their operations. Using a dual-framework approach, we demonstrate how AI can transform both strategic decision-making and daily operations within central banks, taking the Federal Reserve System (FRS) as a representative example. We first consider a top-down view, showing how AI can modernize key central banking functions. We then adopt a bottom-up approach focusing on the impact of generative AI on specific tasks and occupations within the Federal Reserve and find a significant potential for workforce augmentation and efficiency gains. We also address critical challenges associated with AI adoption, such as the need to upgrade data infrastructure and manage workforce transitions.
33998.zh_abstract: 本文研究了中央银行如何战略性地整合人工智能（AI）以增强其运营。通过采用双重框架方法，我们以美联储系统（FRS）为代表，展示了AI如何改变中央银行内部的战略决策和日常运营。我们首先从自上而下的视角出发，展示了AI如何现代化关键中央银行职能。然后，我们采用自下而上的方法，聚焦于生成式AI对美联储内部特定任务和职业的影响，并发现其在劳动力增强和效率提升方面具有显著潜力。我们还讨论了与AI采用相关的关键挑战，例如升级数据基础设施和管理劳动力转型的必要性。
33998.meta: Programs：EFG, ME, PE, PR；JEL：C8, C9, G4

33997.title: Transitory and Permanent Import Tariff Shocks in the United States: An Empirical Investigation
33997.zh_title: 美国暂时性与永久性进口关税冲击：一项实证研究
33997.abstract: We estimate transitory and permanent import tariff shocks in the United States over the postwar period. We find that transitory tariff increases are neither inflationary nor contractionary, and are not associated with monetary tightening. In contrast, permanent tariff increases trigger a temporary rise in inflation (a one-off increase in the price level) and a brief tightening of monetary policy. Consistent with the intertemporal approach to the balance of payments, transitory tariff increases reduce imports and improve the trade balance, whereas permanent increases leave both largely unchanged. Transitory shocks account for approximately 80 percent of tariff movements. Overall, tariff shocks are estimated to be a minor driver of U.S. business cycle fluctuations on average and even during episodes of substantial tariff hikes, such as Nixon 1971, Ford 1975, and Trump 2018.
33997.zh_abstract: 我们估计了战后时期美国的暂时性和永久性进口关税冲击。我们发现，暂时性关税增加既不会引发通胀，也不会导致经济收缩，并且与货币紧缩无关。相比之下，永久性关税增加会引发通胀的暂时上升（价格水平的一次性上涨）和货币政策的短暂收紧。与国际收支跨期方法一致，暂时性关税增加会减少进口并改善贸易平衡，而永久性关税增加则使两者基本保持不变。暂时性冲击约占关税变动的80%。总体而言，估计关税冲击平均而言是美国商业周期波动的次要驱动因素，即使在尼克松1971年、福特1975年和特朗普2018年等大幅加征关税时期也是如此。
33997.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E31, E52, F13, F41

33996.title: Person and Place Effects in Scientific Discovery
33996.zh_title: 科学发现中的人与机构效应
33996.abstract: How much of a scientist’s research output is attributable to individual talent, and how much to the institution where they work? Because markets systematically under-provide fundamental science, the answer matters for how societies allocate the resources that substitute for missing market incentives, how the scientific community evaluates researchers for promotion and grants, and whether the current distribution of scientists across institutions maximizes knowledge production. We study this question using citation-weighted publications in leading life-science journals and a movers design that exploits variation in the output of nearly 40,000 scientists who change institutions. We find that 50 to 60 percent of the variation in a scientist’s research output is attributable to institutional factors. After correcting for limited mobility bias, we document positive assortative matching between scientists and institutions (a correlation of 0.3 between person and place effects), a necessary condition for maximizing aggregate knowledge production under the multiplicative structure of our model. Around two-thirds of the institutional effect is explained by the presence of star researchers. A scientist’s output responds to both the total output of their institution and its funding level, but not to the size of the local research cluster, suggesting that institutional effects operate through the human capital environment within an institution rather than through agglomeration or research funding alone. The symmetry of effects for upward and downward movers implies that institutional advantages do not permanently transfer to scientists who leave. These effects have not diminished despite technologies facilitating remote collaboration, are robust to detailed field-by-year controls, and raise the possibility that similar patterns extend to other areas of fundamental science.
33996.zh_abstract: 科学家的研究成果有多少归因于个人才能，又有多少归因于其所在机构？由于市场系统性地对基础科学投入不足，这个问题的答案对于社会如何分配资源以替代缺失的市场激励、科学界如何评估研究人员的晋升和资助、以及当前科学家在机构间的分布是否最大化知识生产至关重要。我们利用在顶级生命科学期刊上发表的引用加权出版物，以及一个利用近40,000名更换机构的科学家产出变化的研究者流动设计来研究这个问题。我们发现，科学家研究成果变异的50%到60%可归因于机构因素。在纠正有限流动性偏差后，我们记录了科学家与机构之间的正向分类匹配（人与机构效应之间的相关性为0.3），这是在模型乘法结构下最大化总知识生产的必要条件。大约三分之二的机构效应可由明星研究者的存在来解释。科学家的产出对其所在机构的总产出和资助水平均有反应，但对本地研究集群的规模没有反应，这表明机构效应是通过机构内的人力资本环境而非单纯的集聚或研究资助来运作的。向上和向下流动者效应的对称性意味着，机构优势不会永久性地转移给离开的科学家。尽管促进远程协作的技术已经存在，但这些效应并未减弱，并且在加入详细的领域-年份控制后依然稳健，这提高了类似模式可能扩展到基础科学其他领域的可能性。

33995.title: The Revenue and Distributional Impacts of Unemployment Insurance Reform: Evidence from California
33995.zh_title: 失业保险改革的收入与分配影响：来自加利福尼亚州的证据
33995.authors: Mark Duggan, Jonathan Gruber, Audrey Guo
33995.abstract: In the United States, unemployment insurance (UI) is funded through employer-side payroll taxes that are experience-rated based on previous UI claims. States differ significantly with respect to the financing of their programs, and a majority of state programs do not currently meet minimum UI trust fund solvency standards. A common culprit in the least solvent states is a very low tax base of earnings on which UI taxes are levied. We focus on California, the least solvent of the 50 state UI programs, with debt currently to the federal government of $\$21$ billion, and which has the lowest base of taxable earnings at $\$7000$ per year. We use matched employer-employee administrative data to estimate the impact of financing reforms to California’s UI system. We find that raising the taxable earnings base would replenish the state’s UI trust fund and would increase experience rating by reducing the number of systematically subsidized firms. While this improves vertical equity of the UI system, it would also worsen horizontal equity by imposing much larger percentage increases in tax costs on the firms with the fewest layoffs. Alternatively, matching the higher tax base with both higher maximum and lower minimum rates could improve both experience rating and horizontal equity.
33995.zh_abstract: 在美国，失业保险（UI）通过雇主方工资税来资助，该税根据以往的UI索赔进行经验评级。各州在项目融资方面存在显著差异，大多数州的项目目前未达到最低UI信托基金偿付能力标准。在偿付能力最差的州中，一个常见原因是征收UI税的工资税基非常低。我们聚焦于加利福尼亚州，它是50个州UI项目中偿付能力最差的，目前欠联邦政府210亿美元债务，并且其应税工资基数最低，为每年7000美元。我们使用匹配的雇主-雇员行政数据来估计加州UI系统融资改革的影响。我们发现，提高应税工资基数将补充该州的UI信托基金，并通过减少系统性地获得补贴的企业数量来增强经验评级。虽然这改善了UI系统的纵向公平性，但也会通过向裁员最少的公司施加更大比例的税收成本增加，从而恶化横向公平性。或者，将更高的税基与更高的最高税率和更低的最低税率相匹配，可以同时改善经验评级和横向公平性。
33995.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, LS, PE；JEL：H25, J38, J65

33994.title: Health Spillovers: The Broad Impact of Spousal Health Shocks
33994.zh_title: 健康溢出效应：配偶健康冲击的广泛影响
33994.authors: Carolina Arteaga, Natalia Vigezzi, Pilar García-Gómez
33994.abstract: In this paper we provide new evidence on the health spillover effects of health shocks within couples. Using administrative data from the Netherlands and a matching event-study framework, we estimate the causal effect of experiencing a health shock within a couple on the health of the initially unaffected partner. Our findings reveal a significant deterioration in the partner’s health outlook, characterized by substantial increases in hospital visits, overnight stays, and mortality. The health decline is broad in scope, encompassing higher risk of infections, accidents, and digestive and cardiovascular conditions. This deterioration is accompanied by substantial increases in stress, anxiety and depression for both men and women, as well as sleep disorders for women. These effects are not driven by a heavy caregiving load, financial distress or worsening of health behaviors. On the contrary, the adverse outcomes persist despite suggestive positive changes, including increased exercise for both men and women, and reduced alcohol consumption among women.
33994.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们提供了关于夫妻内部健康冲击的健康溢出效应的新证据。利用来自荷兰的行政数据和匹配事件研究框架，我们估计了夫妻中一方经历健康冲击对最初未受影响伴侣健康的因果效应。我们的研究结果显示，伴侣的健康前景显著恶化，表现为住院次数、住院过夜次数和死亡率的大幅增加。健康恶化的范围很广，包括感染、事故、消化系统和心血管疾病风险的增加。这种恶化伴随着男性和女性压力、焦虑和抑郁的显著增加，以及女性睡眠障碍的增加。这些效应并非由沉重的照护负担、财务困境或健康行为恶化所驱动。相反，尽管出现了积极的改变迹象，包括男性和女性运动增加以及女性饮酒减少，但不良后果仍然持续存在。

33993.title: Technifying Ventures
33993.authors: Yoshiki Ando, Emin Dinlersoz, Jeremy Greenwood, Ruben Piazzesi
33993.abstract: What is the relationship between advanced technology adoption, venture capital (VC) funding, employment, and growth? Using US Census Bureau microdata, the analysis shows both factors are independently and positively associated with firm outcomes, but their combination matters most. VC backing is concentrated among a small group of firms that experience large employment gains post-funding. In contrast, advanced technology is adopted by a broader range of firms, which see smaller post-adoption employment increases. A startup model is calibrated with firm-level data to study reallocation effects associated with tax and subsidy changes, and quantify the economic roles of VC and advanced technology.
33993.zh_abstract: 先进技术采用、风险投资（VC）融资、就业和增长之间的关系是什么？利用美国人口普查局的微观数据，分析表明这两个因素都与公司结果独立且正相关，但它们的组合最为重要。风险投资支持集中在少数公司，这些公司在获得融资后经历了大规模的就业增长。相比之下，先进技术被更广泛的公司采用，这些公司在采用后就业增长较小。我们利用企业层面数据校准了一个初创企业模型，以研究与税收和补贴变化相关的重新分配效应，并量化风险投资和先进技术的经济作用。
33993.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, PR；JEL：E13, G24, O30, O40

33992.title: Extending Healthspans in an Aging World
33992.zh_title: 在老龄化世界中延长健康寿命
33992.authors: Stephen P. Utkus, Olivia S. Mitchell
33992.abstract: Extensions in human longevity are prompting a growing interest in maximizing healthspan, or the number of years of life unencumbered by the chronic diseases of old age. This chapter reviews recent research on healthy life extension, including several measures and determinants of longer healthspans. We also provide an overview of recent efforts by medical and business enterprises to enhance longevity and healthspan, followed by a discussion of policy and workplace options to foster healthier lives. Such efforts hold the promise of improving quality of life, expanding labor supply, and lowering the cost of health care costs associated with population aging.
33992.zh_abstract: 人类寿命的延长正促使人们越来越关注最大化健康寿命，即不受老年慢性病困扰的生命年数。本章回顾了关于健康寿命延长的近期研究，包括衡量更长健康寿命的几种方法和决定因素。我们还概述了医疗和商业企业为延长寿命和健康寿命所做的近期努力，随后讨论了促进更健康生活的政策和工作场所选择。这些努力有望改善生活质量、扩大劳动力供给，并降低与人口老龄化相关的医疗保健成本。
33992.meta: Programs：AG, LS；JEL：I12, I24, J11, J14, J16

33991.title: The Real Costs of Washing Away Corruption: Evidence from Brazil’s Lava Jato Investigation
33991.zh_title: 清洗腐败的真实代价：来自巴西“洗车行动”调查的证据
33991.authors: Claudio Ferraz, Luiz C. Moura, Lars Norden, Ricardo Schechtman
33991.abstract: We investigate the economic impacts of one of the world's largest anti-corruption crackdowns, Brazil's Operação Lava Jato (Car Wash). Using a difference-in-differences analysis of unique, matched firm-bank data, we find sizable declines in employment and wage bills for investigated firms, alongside reduced access to credit. We also find adverse indirect effects through the bank credit channel, where highly exposed banks reduce credit to non-investigated firms, particularly for politically connected existing borrowers. Non-investigated firms exposed to the economic shock through their bank relationships suffer declines in wage bills and employment. The findings highlight the intricate economic implications of anti-corruption policies targeting large corporations.
33991.zh_abstract: 我们研究了全球最大规模的反腐行动之一——巴西的“洗车行动”（Operação Lava Jato）的经济影响。利用独特的匹配企业-银行数据进行双重差分分析，我们发现受调查企业的就业和工资总额显著下降，同时信贷获取渠道减少。我们还通过银行信贷渠道发现了不利的间接效应：风险敞口较大的银行减少了对非调查企业的信贷，尤其是对有政治关联的现有借款人的信贷。通过银行关系暴露于经济冲击的非调查企业，其工资总额和就业也出现下降。这些发现凸显了针对大型企业的反腐政策所蕴含的复杂经济影响。
33991.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, LE, LS, POL；JEL：D73, G21, G30, K42

33990.title: Effects of the Minimum Wage on Employment of Young Adults with Cognitive Disabilities
33990.zh_title: 最低工资对认知障碍青年就业的影响
33990.authors: Barry Chiswick, Hope Corman, Dhaval M. Dave, Nancy Reichman
33990.abstract: We estimate the effects of increases in the minimum wage on labor market outcomes of working-age adults with cognitive disabilities, a vulnerable and low-skilled group, using data from the American Community Survey (2008-2023) and a generalized difference-in-differences research design. We found that a higher effective minimum wage reduces employment and labor force participation but has no effect on labor supply at the intensive margin for this group. Effects were stronger for those with lower educational attainment. We found no significant labor market effects of an increase in the minimum wage for individuals with physical disabilities or in the non-disabled population.
33990.zh_abstract: 我们利用美国社区调查（2008-2023年）的数据和广义双重差分研究设计，估计了最低工资上涨对患有认知障碍的劳动年龄成年人（一个脆弱且低技能的群体）劳动力市场结果的影响。我们发现，更高的有效最低工资降低了该群体的就业率和劳动力参与率，但对集约边际上的劳动力供给没有影响。对于受教育程度较低的人群，这种影响更为强烈。我们发现，最低工资上涨对肢体残疾人群或非残疾人群没有显著的劳动力市场影响。

33989.title: Why Is Fertility So Low in High Income Countries?
33989.zh_title: 为什么高收入国家的生育率如此之低？
33989.authors: Melissa Schettini Kearney, Phillip B. Levine
33989.abstract: We consider why fertility has fallen in recent decades in almost all high-income countries. We begin by documenting declining total fertility and rising childlessness across cohorts, highlighting the need to focus on cohort versus period-specific fertility rates. With this motivation, we propose a conceptual model of fertility determination that augments the standard Becker model with an explicit role for social norms and cohort-specific contextual factors, including broad social and economic influences and an expanded set of consumption and lifestyle options. We posit that these forces have led to “shifting priorities,” reducing the centrality of parenthood. We then review existing empirical evidence –and conclude that the decline in fertility likely reflects a complex mix of changing norms around work, parenting, gender roles, and leisure consistent with our cohort-based conceptual framework. We conclude with suggestions for future research and a brief discussion of policy implications.
33989.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了近几十年来几乎所有高收入国家生育率下降的原因。我们首先记录了各队列中总生育率下降和终身不育率上升的情况，强调了关注队列特定生育率而非时期特定生育率的必要性。基于此动机，我们提出了一个生育率决定的概念模型，该模型在标准贝克尔模型的基础上，增加了社会规范和队列特定背景因素（包括广泛的社会经济影响以及更多样化的消费和生活方式选择）的明确作用。我们假设这些力量导致了“优先级的转变”，降低了为人父母的核心地位。然后，我们回顾了现有的实证证据，并得出结论：生育率下降可能反映了围绕工作、育儿、性别角色和休闲的规范变化这一复杂组合，这与我们基于队列的概念框架是一致的。最后，我们提出了未来研究的建议，并简要讨论了政策含义。

33988.title: Doctors as Gatekeepers in Social Insurance: Evidence from Workers’ Compensation Insurance
33988.zh_title: 医生作为社会保险的守门人：来自工伤保险的证据
33988.abstract: In many social insurance programs, eligibility for disability benefits depends on medical evaluations performed by doctors. This paper studies the role of doctors as gatekeepers in workers’ compensation insurance and quantifies the discretion they exercise in medical evaluations of physical impairments. Using comprehensive administrative data and random assignment of doctors to independent medical examinations, we identify substantial systematic variation in evaluation decisions across doctors and estimate its consequences for claimant outcomes and program costs. Being evaluated by a one standard-deviation more generous doctor increases subsequent cash benefits by about 20%, compensated time out of work by 20%, injury-related medical spending by 12%, and total workers’ compensation costs by 17%. Doctor effects vary meaningfully with observable characteristics. We further examine how discretion interacts with institutional rules and economic incentives when claimants can select their own doctors. More generous doctors attract more claimants, while insurers are more likely to dispute their evaluations, indicating that both parties influence the allocation of gatekeepers in line with their incentives and thereby shape the distribution of program benefits. Finally, we show that alternative evaluator assignment rules can substantially affect claimant outcomes and program costs, underscoring the importance of policies governing the allocation and oversight of gatekeepers in the design of workers’ compensation and other disability-related social insurance programs.
33988.zh_abstract: 在许多社会保险项目中，伤残津贴的资格取决于医生进行的医学评估。本文研究了医生在工伤保险中作为守门人的作用，并量化了他们在身体损伤医学评估中行使的自由裁量权。利用全面的行政数据和医生对独立医学检查的随机分配，我们识别出不同医生在评估决策上存在显著的系统性差异，并估计了其对索赔人结果和项目成本的影响。由慷慨程度高一个标准差的医生进行评估，会使后续现金津贴增加约20%，带薪休假时间增加20%，与工伤相关的医疗支出增加12%，工伤保险总成本增加17%。医生的影响随其可观测特征而有显著变化。我们进一步考察了当索赔人可以选择自己的医生时，自由裁量权如何与制度规则和经济激励相互作用。更慷慨的医生会吸引更多索赔人，而保险公司则更有可能对其评估提出异议，这表明双方都根据自身激励影响守门人的分配，从而塑造了项目福利的分配。最后，我们表明，替代性的评估者分配规则会显著影响索赔人结果和项目成本，这凸显了在设计工伤保险及其他与伤残相关的社会保险项目时，管理守门人分配和监督的政策的重要性。

33987.title: Due Diligence and the Allocation of Venture Capital
33987.zh_title: 尽职调查与风险资本的配置
33987.abstract: How do investors choose the intensity of their due diligence, and how does that choice affect investment outcomes? Using cell phone signal data, we measure the duration of pre-investment meetings between venture capitalists (VCs) and startup employees. This measure captures one important component of VC due diligence. Less due diligence is associated with hotter deals and markets, busier investors, and greater distance, consistent with a theory of costly learning. Also consistent with that theory, less due diligence is associated with more volatile investment performance, as VCs allocate capital under greater uncertainty. Overall, VCs appear to trade off the costs of due diligence with its improvements to capital allocation.
33987.zh_abstract: 投资者如何选择其尽职调查的强度，以及这种选择如何影响投资结果？利用手机信号数据，我们衡量了风险投资家（VC）与初创企业员工在投资前会面的持续时间。这一指标捕捉了风险投资家尽职调查的一个重要组成部分。较少的尽职调查与更热门的交易和市场、更忙碌的投资者以及更大的地理距离相关，这与高成本学习的理论一致。同样与该理论一致的是，较少的尽职调查与更不稳定的投资业绩相关，因为风险投资家在更大的不确定性下配置资本。总体而言，风险投资家似乎在尽职调查的成本与其对资本配置的改进之间进行权衡。

33986.title: Do Pensions Enhance Teacher Effort and Selective Retention?
33986.zh_title: 养老金能否提升教师努力程度并实现选择性留任？
33986.authors: Michael D. Bates, Andrew C. Johnston
33986.abstract: Theoretical rationales for employer-provided pensions often focus on their ability to increase employee effort and selectively retain quality workers. We test these hypotheses using rich administrative data on public school teachers around the pension-eligibility threshold. When teachers cross the threshold, their effective compensation drops by over 50 percent of salary due to sharply reduced pension accrual rates. Standard economic models predict this compensation reduction should decrease teacher effort and output, yet we observe no such decline. This suggests that yearly pension accruals near retirement do not meaningfully increase effort. Similarly, if pensions selectively retained better teachers, we would expect average teacher quality to decline when the retentive incentive disappears at the threshold. Instead, we find no change in the composition of teacher quality, suggesting pensions do not selectively retain higher-performing workers in late career.
33986.zh_abstract: 雇主提供养老金的理论依据通常侧重于其提高员工努力程度和选择性留住高质量员工的能力。我们利用公立学校教师在养老金资格门槛附近的丰富行政数据来检验这些假设。当教师跨过这一门槛时，由于养老金累积率急剧下降，其有效薪酬会下降超过工资的50%。标准经济模型预测，这种薪酬减少应会降低教师的努力程度和产出，然而我们并未观察到这种下降。这表明，临近退休时每年的养老金累积并未显著提高努力程度。同样，如果养老金能选择性留住更好的教师，那么当这一留任激励在门槛处消失时，我们应预期教师平均质量会下降。相反，我们发现教师质量的构成没有变化，这表明养老金在职业生涯后期并未选择性留住表现更优的员工。
33986.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE；JEL：H55, I21, J33, J45, M52

33985.title: What Do Market-Access Subsidies Do? Experimental Evidence from Tunisia
33985.zh_title: 市场准入补贴有何作用？来自突尼斯的实验证据
33985.authors: Nadia Ali, Giacomo De Giorgi, Aminur Rahman, Eric Verhoogen
33985.abstract: Many countries seek to promote exports by subsidizing market access, but evidence on such efforts has been mixed. We present the first randomized evaluation of a government financial-support program explicitly targeting exports, the Tasdir+ program in Tunisia. The program offered matching grants for fixed market-access costs but not variable costs. Tracking outcomes in administrative data, we find positive effects on exports on average. We find limited impacts on the number of destinations or exported products, which were stated policy targets. The finding that the fixed-cost subsidies expanded exports on the intensive margin but not the extensive margins of destinations or products stands in contrast to the predictions of several workhorse trade models.
33985.zh_abstract: 许多国家试图通过补贴市场准入来促进出口，但关于此类努力的证据好坏参半。我们首次对明确针对出口的政府财政支持项目——突尼斯的Tasdir+项目——进行了随机评估。该项目为固定市场准入成本（而非可变成本）提供配套赠款。通过追踪行政数据中的结果，我们发现平均而言对出口有积极影响。我们发现对目标目的地数量或出口产品数量的影响有限，而这两者都是既定的政策目标。固定成本补贴在集约边际上扩大了出口，但在目的地或产品的广延边际上没有效果，这一发现与几个主流贸易模型的预测形成对比。

33984.title: Out-of-School Learning: Subtitling vs. Dubbing and the Acquisition of Foreign-Language Skills
33984.zh_title: 校外学习：字幕配音与外语技能的习得
33984.authors: Frauke Baumeister, Eric A. Hanushek, Ludger Woessmann
33984.abstract: The development of English-language skills, a near necessity in today’s global economy, is heavily influenced by historical national decisions about whether to subtitle or dub TV content. While prior studies of language acquisition have focused on schools, we show the overwhelming influence of out-of-school learning. We identify the causal effect of subtitling in a difference-in-differences specification that compares English to math skills in European countries that do and do not use subtitles. We find a large positive effect of subtitling on English-language skills of over one standard deviation. The effect is robust to accounting for linguistic similarity, economic incentives to learn English, and cultural protectiveness. Consistent with oral TV transmission, the effect is larger for listening and speaking skills than for reading.
33984.zh_abstract: 英语技能的发展在当今全球经济中几乎是必需的，它深受历史上各国关于电视内容采用字幕还是配音的国家决策的影响。虽然以往的语言习得研究侧重于学校，但我们展示了校外学习的压倒性影响。我们在一个双重差分设定中识别了字幕的因果效应，该设定比较了使用和不使用字幕的欧洲国家中英语与数学技能。我们发现字幕对英语技能有超过一个标准差的巨大正向影响。在考虑了语言相似性、学习英语的经济动机以及文化保护性之后，这一结果依然稳健。与电视的口语传播特性一致，这种效应对听力和口语技能的影响大于对阅读技能的影响。
33984.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：H0, I2, J24

33982.title: Basel Endgame: Bank Capital Requirements and the Future of International Standard Setting
33982.zh_title: 巴塞尔终局：银行资本要求与国际标准制定的未来
33982.authors: Stephen G. Cecchetti, Jeremy C. Kress, Kermit L. Schoenholtz
33982.abstract: In 2023, US regulators proposed the “Basel Endgame,” a long-awaited overhaul of bank capital requirements. The proposal aimed to bring the United States into compliance with international standards established by the Basel Committee on Banking Supervision in response to the 2008 Global Financial Crisis. However, fierce industry opposition to what banks viewed as a costly increase in capital requirements effectively killed the proposal. In this essay, we describe the purpose of bank capital and the history of international standard-setting in bank regulation. We then highlight the most important aspects of the Basel Endgame, as well as the arguments for and against adopting the rule. We show that the debate unnecessarily conflated two distinct questions: (1) whether the United States should comply with international regulatory standards, and (2) whether the United States should raise large banks’ capital requirements. While there are strong grounds to answer both questions in the affirmative, they need not be addressed together. That is, the United States can implement international standards in a capital-neutral manner to preserve global cooperation in bank regulation, leaving the separate question of raising capital requirements for another day.
33982.zh_abstract: 2023年，美国监管机构提出了“巴塞尔终局”，这是一项期待已久的银行资本要求改革。该提案旨在使美国符合巴塞尔银行监管委员会为应对2008年全球金融危机而制定的国际标准。然而，银行业对银行视为成本高昂的资本要求增加进行了激烈反对，这实际上扼杀了该提案。在本文中，我们描述了银行资本的目的以及银行监管中国际标准制定的历史。然后，我们强调了巴塞尔终局最重要的方面，以及支持和反对采纳该规则的论点。我们表明，这场辩论不必要地将两个不同的问题混为一谈：（1）美国是否应遵守国际监管标准，以及（2）美国是否应提高大型银行的资本要求。虽然这两个问题都有充分理由得到肯定回答，但它们不必同时处理。也就是说，美国可以以资本中性的方式实施国际标准，以维护银行监管中的全球合作，而将提高资本要求的单独问题留待日后解决。

33981.title: Lab Experiments in Developing Country Contexts
33981.zh_title: 发展中国家背景下的实验室实验
33981.abstract: Lab-in-the-field experiments, in which lab experiments are conducted in more naturalistic settings, are increasingly being implemented in developing country contexts. In this chapter, we outline the conceptual and logistical challenges typically associated with lab-in-the-field experiments in non-Western settings. We describe the importance of worldviews and how researcher preconceptions may inadvertently shape the types of research questions that are asked. We emphasize the importance of increasing diversity of subject pools and researchers. We also suggest a set of best practices when implementing lab-in-the-field experiments in developing countries.
33981.zh_abstract: 田野实验室实验，即在更自然的环境中进行实验室实验，正越来越多地在发展中国家背景下实施。在本章中，我们概述了在非西方环境中进行田野实验室实验通常面临的概念和后勤挑战。我们描述了世界观的重要性，以及研究者的先入之见可能如何无意中塑造所提出的研究问题类型。我们强调了增加受试者群体和研究者多样性的重要性。我们还提出了一套在发展中国家实施田野实验室实验时的最佳实践建议。

33999.title: Finding John Smith: Using Extra Information for Historical Record Linkage
33999.zh_title: 寻找张三：利用额外信息进行历史记录链接
33999.authors: Ran Abramitzky, Leah Platt Boustan, Harriet M. Brookes Gray, Katherine Eriksson, Santiago Pérez, Hannah M. Postel, Myera Rashid, Noah Simon
33999.abstract: We introduce a new rule-based linking method for historical Census records. We augment earlier algorithms based on name, age and place of birth (Abramitzky, Boustan, Eriksson, 2012, or “basic ABE”), with five matching characteristics – middle initial, county of residence, and spouse and parents’ names. Relative to basic ABE, ABE-Extra Information (“ABE-EI”) greatly increases match rates, improves accuracy and is similarly representative of the population on most attributes, with geographic mobility being one important exception. Relative to machine learning algorithms, ABE-EI has somewhat lower match rates, improved representativeness, and offers full replicability. We also create the first ABE-based links for women.
33999.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种新的基于规则的方法，用于链接历史人口普查记录。我们在早期基于姓名、年龄和出生地的算法（Abramitzky, Boustan, Eriksson, 2012，或称为“基本ABE”）基础上，增加了五个匹配特征——中间名首字母、居住县、配偶姓名和父母姓名。与基本ABE相比，ABE-额外信息（“ABE-EI”）大幅提高了匹配率，提升了准确性，并且在大多数属性上对人口的代表性相似，但地理流动性是一个重要的例外。与机器学习算法相比，ABE-EI的匹配率略低，但代表性更好，并且具有完全的可复制性。我们还首次为女性创建了基于ABE的链接。
33999.meta: Programs：AG, CH, DAE, ED, EH, LS, PE；JEL：N31, N32
